programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Nacha y Mane se enfrentan a Dania al ver que le tira sus cosas al agua. Los mariscos llegan para la cruda y la ida a un bar termina en una fiesta en la casa. Mane molesta a Dania y un nuevo enfrentamiento entre ellas comienza a gestarse.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Una nueva integrante llega a la casa. La boss anuncia que tienen que trabajar para ser parte del carnaval. El team tendo insiste en que Jey se lleve a la cama a Nacha y un bar es el sitio de encuentros y desencuentros de la familia.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Tadeo recibe una sorpresa y los shore se conmueven con su reacción. La celebración del cumpleaños de Xavier comienza. Chile y Jey tienen problemas de erección y Jawy reta a Chile a un duelo de boxeo.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La espera termina y Jey por fin logra cumplirle a Nacha. Celia manda a un grupo a trabajar al acuario. La celebración de Xavier continua y las comadres se escapan del antro, lo que hace que Mane y Jawy terminen peleando.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Jawy y Mane continúan. Xavi decide invitar a Pepe para que se quede en la casa. Los Shore comienzan a dudar de Fernanda. Karime busca al notario para que valide su virginidad y Mane y Fernanda terminan en un fuerte enfrentamiento.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Mane y Fernanda se van a los golpes. El conclave decide hacerle un examen a Fernanda para evitar su expulsión. Un partido de fútbol entre los Shore y los Big hippo decidirá el futuro de la casa y Pepe recibe una propuesta de amor eterno.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: El examen termina y Fernanda se mantiene en la casa. Chile escucha el plan de las rechazadas y las delata. Una maestra de baile pone en su lugar a Mane y a Karime. En un restaurante se desata una batalla campal.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Después de enfrentar a Mane, Dania toma una decisión importante. Los Shore reciben una clase de banda donde nace oficialmente el corrido del “Verga muerta”. Jawy habla con Fernanda y Mane está decidida a dejar sola en la casa a Dania.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Xavier y Pepe se enfrentan nuevamente. Un grupo de brujas llega a la casa y no todos quedan contentos con sus premoniciones. En la noche de noche de chicas, Dania le pide una disculpa a Mane y su reacción deja a varios sin palabras.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Los Shore se preguntan sobre el paradero de Dania. Chile y Diana tienen una cita romántica. Karime y Mane terminan en el hospital. Pepe y Ramiro reciben una llamada que cambia sus planes y los Shore se alistan para el carnaval.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Los Shore llegan el carnaval. Karime y Potro tienen un momento de mucha intimidad. Un hipnotizador llega a la casa. Nacha tiene sospechas y decide hacerse una prueba de embarazo y una nueva integrante llega a las vacaciones.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Mane y Karime le hacen un amarre a sus amados y Nacha explota contra Jey. Potro sorprende a Isa besando a Chile y se molesta. Mane se entera de que Potro está hablando mal de Jawy y toma cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Actors Susan Cookson and Suzannne Packer battle it out around the northwest of England. Susan discovers her inner haggler as Suzanne keeps the purse-string very tight as she bids to discover an item with some real age.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Gastronomes Tony Singh and Cyrus Todiwala visit the east coast of Scotland. Tony discovers why one Scottish city was home to many millionaires and Cyrus finds out why Anstruther was a pivotal fishing port in the 19th century.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Top wheelchair Paralympians Tanni Grey-Thompson and Jade Jones look for antiques in the northeast of England. Tanni tries her hand at traditional glassmaking and Jade learns about the man who was a design champion of the region.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Journalists John Stapleton and Lynn Faulds Wood are joined by Thomas Plant and Margie Cooper. Lynn and Thomas are knee-deep in antiques while hunting for biscuit tins and Margie tries to convince John some rare lamps will make a profit.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Historians Suzannah Lipscomb and Kate Williams travel from Bletchley to an auction in London. They hear how Mrs. Beeton became the first domestic goddess and why Luton played a critical role in the fashion world when hats were daily wear.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Blue Peter presenters Sarah Greene and Peter Duncan are on the hunt for antiques. An incredible haul of antiques, including chimney pots, Pinocchio and a pair of African fertility figures, go under the gavel at an auction.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Actors Hayley Mills and Stephen Tompkinson amble around the northeast in a vintage E Type Jag and Rolls Royce. Hayley detours to hear the story behind Earl Grey tea and Stephen visits the amateur football team who won the World Cup twice!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Pals Ricky Tomlinson and Micky Starke are off on a rollicking Road Trip adventure. Ricky turns out to be an impulse buyer, while Micky adopts a more relaxed approach. Gamble buys include antiques from Japan and China.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Ore Oduba and Joanne Clifton are hunting for treasure around Sussex and Kent. Ore learns about the rich history of 'Stool Ball' and Joanne visits Shoreham-by-Sea, once a hotbed of movie-making in the black and white days.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Actors Tina Hobley and Sharon Maughan are in the Cotswold countryside. Sharon learns about the troubled love life of one of the country's greatest artists, while Tina finds out why the wealthy once raced cars up a hill at breakneck speed.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Co-stars Cliff Parisi and Judy Parfitt team up in Kent. Cliff is keen to know why the Hurricane isn't as "sexy" as a Spitfire. Judy goes back in time to hear about mercenary sailors who defended the country before Britain had a Navy.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team make a second visit to Port Sunlight on the Wirral.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return to the quadrangle of St Andrews University in Scotland.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts arrive on the North Yorkshire coast at Scarborough.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents from inside the Farnborough wind tunnels.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team travels to Cornwall, where items include a ring with a grim family story.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: In Cornwall, the team finds early medical instruments and a rare work by Barbara Hepworth.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Aberystwyth Arts Centre welcomes Fiona Bruce and the team of experts.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team travel to Wightwick Manor near Wolverhampton.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce looks back on another vintage year for the Antiques Roadshow.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team travel to Fountains Abbey near Ripon in Yorkshire.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team travel to the newly restored Stowe House in Buckinghamshire.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team head to Scotland for a busy day in the grounds of Cawdor Castle near Inverness.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Everyone loves giraffes, but we don't know a lot about them; Dr Julian Fennessy starts to reveal their secrets -- the most important being that they are disappearing.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Only one man can swim amongst breaching great white sharks as they hunt.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates this astonishing story of a wild cheetah family, revealing in intimate detail what it takes to turn tiny cubs into accomplished predators.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: At the jungle animal hospital, a dedicated team nurse their exotic patients back to health and prepare a troop of spider monkeys and a flock of scarlet macaws for their release.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Orphaned baby rhinos in South Africa; how the deadly predators are tracked; what can be done to save the species from being poached to extinction.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Setting sail to the island of Bali, Steve and the team are out to find the elusive ocean sunfish; these deep ocean giants feed on poisonous jellyfish and ascend to the shallows for a spa session at a cleaner fish station.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve heads to the Loango National Park on the western coast of Gabon and home to some deadly predators.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve heads to Norway to dive with the planet's ultimate predator: the orca; he also witnesses the northern lights and gets up close to the mighty mouth of a humpback whale.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve starts his South African adventure in one of the weirdest places he's ever gone looking for animals: a power station, in the dark. He stakes out the location for a wild cat that has so far eluded the Deadly 60, the serval.

programme.title: Deadly 60

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve and his team travel to the pristine island of Borneo.

programme.title: Deadly 60

programme.title: Deadly 60

programme.title: Deadly 60

programme.title: Deadly 60

programme.title: Deadly 60

programme.title: Deadly 60

programme.title: Deadly 60

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Pechanga Resort and Casino with a contender showdown as Lorenz Larkin takes on Fernando Gonzalez. Plus Saad Awad looks to keep his hot streak alive against J .J. Ambrose. And AJ Matthews goes to war when he faces Kendall Grove!

programme.title: Bellator 194: Nelson vs Mitrione
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Mohegan Sun with heavyweight grand prix action, as Matt Mitrione and Roy "Big Country" Nelson go to battle with each man looking to advance to the semi finals. Also on the card, KO artist Patricky Pitbull and Vadim Nemkov.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is back with a bantamweight world title fight as Darrion Caldwell looks to defend his belt against dangerous opponent Leandro Higo. Card also features the return of baddest man on the planet, Joe Warren, as he takes on veteran Joe Taimanglo.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Budapest with a lightweight showdown between Benson Henderson and Roger Huerta. Also on the card, heavy-handed wrestling phenom Ed Ruth and Bellator Kickboxing Champ Denise Kielholtz return to MMA.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is in St. Louis, MO with a barnburner main event as former lightweight champ Michael Chandler takes on Brandon Girtz. Also on the card, undefeated phenom, AJ McKee puts his record on the line when he meets Justin Lawrence.

programme.title: Bellator 198: Fedor vs Mir
programme.desc: Bellator MMA heads to Chicago, IL with a historic matchup in the Heavyweight Grand Prix as two former world champs collide when Fedor Emelianenko takes on Frank Mir. Plus Neiman Gracie returns to action, while submission ace Dillon Danis makes his debut.

programme.title: Bellator 199: Bader vs King Mo
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to San Jose with an absolutely stacked fight card as Ryan Bader collides with King Mo in Heavyweight Grand Prix action; Paul Daley takes on Jon Fitch in a dynamic matchup at welterweight, and Cheick Kongo and Javy Ayala go toe to toe.

programme.title: Bellator 200: Carvalho vs Mousasi
programme.desc: Bellator MMA’s historic 200th event in London features Rafael Carvalho putting his middleweight world title on the line against one of the best in the world, Gegard Mousasi. Plus, Michael “Venom” Page looks to finish David “The Caveman” Rickels.

programme.title: Bellator 201: Macfarlane vs Lara
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to California as women’s flyweight world champion Ilima-Lei Macfarlane looks to defend her title against fast-rising Colombian sensation Alejandra Lara. Ryan Couture takes on Saad Awad, and Juan Archuleta returns to action.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with husband and wife, Nathan and April, who claim a woman named Ashley is fixated on their beautiful twin daughters and continuously posts pictures of them online, posing as their mother! How will Ashley react when confronted? Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Angie says she's fed up with husband Jason's, mom, Kathy. Angie says her mother-in-law is rude, judgmental & meddles. Kathy says Angie is a liar & cheater & she's responsible for all the drama. Can Dr. Phil help these in-laws put years of animosity aside?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: What happens when a parent's agenda becomes so extreme that his or her children are forced to live a harsh, stoic existence?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: New details of Rebecca Zahau's death: Was the scene staged to deceive police it was suicide? Renowned forensic pathologist Dr. Cyril Wecht reveals his findings to the family after examining Rebecca's exhumed remains. Does he think foul play was involved?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Harv and Lynne say their son, Mark, is an adolescent living in a 41-year-old man’s body. Mark is currently homeless and living in his beat-up car held together with bungee cords and glue. But Mark explains that he is “car camping” and not homeless.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Blake, 26, is a college graduate and on the dean's list with a 3.5 GPA. He has thrown it away to sit around and smoke pot in the rent-free house his mom supplied. He has aspirations, like stripping off his shirt to show off his self-professed buff body.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In 2014, former live-in nanny Diane Stretton made headlines when she refused to move out of Marcella Bracamonte's home. The women come face-to-face on Dr. Phil's stage. Who's the victim in this mother vs. nanny feud?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Kathi says son, Nico, 14, plays video games all day & charged thousands buying tokens. Nico attended only six days of school this year & when disciplined, Nico rages, curses & terrorizes. Kathi says he learned this behavior from his dad, Evo; Evo agrees.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A severe case of Munchausen syndrome by proxy leads to murder. Gypsy Rose Blanchard decided that killing her own mother was her only way to escape years of abuse. She reveals her story to Dr. Phil in an exclusive interview.Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Amber was the envy of her friends, married, 2 kids, a beautiful home & 6-figure salary as a top-selling real estate agent. When she and her husband divorced, her life spiraled out of control. Dr.Phil examines Amber's fall from grace. Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jeffrey Dahmer Pt. 1. Dr. Phil tells the real story & meets the real people who knew the real monster that was Dahmer. Hear from the sister of a victim saying the Netflix series glorified the man she calls "Satan," also two men tortured by Dahmer.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Last year, Judy says her husband of 30 years, Danny, suffered a mid-life crisis, had an affair and filed for divorce -- but now he wants her back. What advice does Dr. Phil give the couple?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Mom Anita & daughter Alexa say an incident 3 years ago left the family shattered: an ex-husband, a loaded gun, a little boy caught between parents & now an ex-mother-in-law who says her son is blameless & is going to court for grandson visitation rights.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Victoria wrote to Dr. Phil after she says her daughter, Jessica, 18, physically attacked her on multiple occasions, leaving a gash in her head from a cellphone & her house damaged, as well as her body bruised after a Thanksgiving day family throw down.

channel.display-name: Best of The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Costume designer Patricia Field is telling Drew all about some of the famous looks she's created for "Sex and the City," "The Devil Wears Prada" and more.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew-crew member Danny Seo is back and sharing professional laundry tips with Drew andKerry Washington, including how to get makeup stains out of sheets.Drew and Ross Mathews are at the Drew's News desk and covering the hottest topics.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Almond and the Seahorse" star Rebel Wilson is joining Drew. HGTV's Lauren Makk is talking all about candle sticks.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: It's a special edition of Drew's News on location at Comic Con with iconic actress and star of "Halloween Ends" Jamie Lee Curtis joining Drew at the news desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up and covering topics like the solutions you can try if you're a chronic late texter and the reason many people are opting for environmentally friendly burials.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Honk for Jesus" star Regina Hall joins Drew to chat. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Plus, In A Minute Drew and Regina surprise one lucky audience member with a big prize!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, it's an all-new Cookbook Club with "Half Baked Harvest" author Tieghan Gerard who is whipping up Finish Spicy Shrimp Tacos.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is joined by rapper, actor, and entrepreneur Fat Joe at the news desk. Then, comedian Nick Kroll stops by to chat about his new stand-up comedy special, "Little Big Boy.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are back at the news desk and hitting the hottest headlines. Drew-crew member Pilar Valdes is sharing pro tips for making burgers. Horticulturist Chris Freimuth is sharing some easy flower tips.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, Celebrity Hair Stylist Chris Appleton is transforming three viewers with hair makeovers.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actor Justice Smith joins Drew and he's dishing about his latest film, "Dungeons and Dragons." Drew and Ross Mathews are joined by Ali Landry at the Drew's News desk as they serve the news sunny-side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The cast of "Emily in Paris" including Lily Collins, Ashley Park, Philippine Leroy-Beaulieu and Lucas Bravo stop by to chat about the new season. The cast is also participating in an "Emily in Paris" style makeover for a deserving audience member.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Icon Martha Stewart and Drew tackle relationship red flags at the news desk and Martha reveals which young star she simply adores.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Lena Dunham on her new medieval comedy film "Catherine Called Birdy." Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is joined by Garcelle Beauva is for a special female empowerment edition of Drew's News. "Claiming Space" author and mentor Eliza Van Cort is sharing tips for female empowerment and how to claim your space.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Bronwyn Tarboton is sharing some genius upcycling tips including how to create home décor out of items in your trash.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Making The Cut" Judge Nicole Richie updates Drew on her bearded dragon Speedy, the birthday trauma they've both experienced and what it's really like working with Heidi Klum.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Tiki Barber joins Drew & Ross Mathews on Drew's News covering headlines about lies in relationships & finding a sheep in an Airbnb. Chef Anne Burrell teaches cooking honey garlic salmon & charred string beans in Drew's Cooking School.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The celebration continues, and Drew's birthday twin Rachel Dratch has a delicious surprise for her when she joinsDrew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: All American" star Taye Diggs is joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to hit the hottest headlines of the day! Jamila Norman is joining Drew and Taye and sharing tips on how to build your own herb garden.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The hosts of "The Talk" continue their Drew's News takeover and hitting today's hottest headlines like the woman who threw a party and invited sixty-five of her dating app matches.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News: Food News edition covering everything!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Champions" director Bobby Farrelly is talking to Drew and joined by cast members Madison Tevlin, Kevin Iannucci and Joshua Felder to chat about the film. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actress Eva Longoria is joining Drew in the kitchen and they're cooking up Spaghetti Alle Vongole. Best-selling author Lewis Howes joins Drew and Ross Mathewsat the Drew's News desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Talk" co-host Sheryl Underwood is joining Drew and talking all about dating! Drew and Ross Mathews are covering the latest headlines in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: A year ago, actress Dylan Mulvaney publicly came out as a trans woman for the first time and began documenting her transition in her Tik-Tok series "Days of Girlhood," that now has over a billion views.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Cameron Diaz cook and chat about their culinary adventures. Andrea Lavinthal recreates Drew's past looks.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Jethro decides to become a "double naught" spy and converts the family's truck into his idea of a Bondmobile. But he becomes the unwitting pawn in another banker's scheme.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale's biggest rival John Cushing succeeds in getting the Clampetts to transfer all of their money to his bank.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Mrs. Drydale's poodle Claude is to enter a dog show but gets sick right before. Granny offers to doctor the dog but Ellie Mae is concerned he doesn't know any tricks so she decides to help out with one of her own pets.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: John Brewster, the oilman from Tulsa, is bringing his new bride to California for their honeymoon. Somehow the Clampetts get the idea that their backyard rustic cabin is the ideal place for the Brewsters to stay.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: With the arrival of spring, the Countess returns for Granny's new batch of spring tonic. Granny thinks she's looking for a new husband and that Jed is her perfect match.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale owns a building that houses a beatnik's club. He hopes to get rid of them when they can't pay their rent but they find a new a sponsor: Jed Clampett.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Jed soon regrets helping out the beatniks with their money problems when Jethro, Elly May (and even Granny!) decide to join them.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale is appalled to learn that Jed is going door-to-door peddling his services as a handyman. But then he's apoplectic when he discovers that Jed has been hired by a rival bank.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: A long time employee of the Commerce Bank is being forcibly retired to make way for a new computer system. A chance meeting with the Clampetts gives him an idea about dealing with Mr. Drysdale.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Beauregard Short arrives in Beverly Hills from back home. Everyone assumes he's looking for a wife and Jethro decides to show him how to be like him, an international playboy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Mr. Brewster, the oil man who made Jed a multi-millionaire, arrives in Beverly Hills with his wife planning to build their dream house. Jed and Granny think they have the perfect house in mind for their dream home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Granny is determined to go back home even if she has to walk back all by herself. When she reaches Las Vegas she has second thoughts. Jethro gets arrested by an undercover cop.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale thinks she has a new way of getting rid of the Clampetts: talk Jed into donating their mansion to the city for an art museum. They agree, on the assumption that they are supposed to provide the artworks and not move out.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Granny confuses Mrs. Drysdale's forays into astrology with the practice of black magic. An intended gift for Ellie Mae from Mr. Drysdale only adds to the confusion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Jethro is anxious to become a new "Double Naught" spy and Mr. Drysdale gives him his own office. A bank robber hopes to con an unwitting Jethro into helping him get into the bank vault.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: When the Clampetts decide they want to go home for Possum Day, Mr. Drysdale attempts to put together a Possum Day in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Jethro thinks the Drysdale's young attractive maid is interested in him. He commences to courting her but she is actually interested in watching the football game on the Clampett's color TV.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: The Clampetts (thereafter Mr. Drysdale) mistake the new neighbor's maidservant for the actual owner. Granny tries her best to set Jed up with her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Granny's concocts a love potion for Elly Mae at the same time Mr. Drysdale hires an escort for Elly. Dean arrives at the mansion with the Clampetts believing he's Miss Jane's boyfriend so Granny tries a reverse spell.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: The Clampetts (thereafter Mr. Drysdale) mistake the new neighbor's maidservant for the actual owner. Granny tries her best to set Jed up with her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Mr. Lucas Sebastian, a billionaire entrepreneur, wants Jed to invest in his new venture, undersea farming.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Mr. Farquar, Mrs. Drysdale's father comes for a visit. When he's alone with Drysdale, he reveals he's broke. It seems on his way over, he passed through Las Vegas and lost his whole fortune and is asking Drysdale for a handout, which he refuses.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Daddy Farquhar continues to visit the Clampetts' mansion to his daughter Margaret's displeasure. He has plans for Granny and her money in Las Vegas but she's expecting a marriage proposal.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Jethro wants to be a general and Mr. Drysdale decides the safest idea is to get him into a boys military academy. With Jethro twice the size of the other boys, the commander has his doubts while a mock battle confuses Granny and Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: When Mr. Drysdale is unhappy with Dr. Clyburn's treatment of his cold the Clampetts hear about it. Granny decides it's time to set up practice and enlists the rest of her family to help. She also claims a cure for the common cold.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: The world's richest woman wants to buy the Clampett mansion and will stop at nothing to get it. Will Jed finally sell?

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Granny wants to learn to drive the truck but can't get used to modern day contraptions. A horse is more of what she wants and Mr. Drysdale gets her one, a professional race horse.

programme.desc: Después de que encuentran muerto a un anestesiólogo de cirugía plástica por un aparente suicidio, Horatio cree que podría ser un caso de asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un corredor de diamantes es asesinado a tiros en un estacionamiento, un hombre con discapacidad mental presenció el asesinato y quiere ayudar a Horatio a resolver el crimen.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a un hombre, Juan Marco Varón, que puede haber torturado o no a refugiados cubanos, llaman al equipo de CSI para investigar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y su equipo se adentran en el mundo de las celebridades e investigan el asesinato de un paparazzi. Él descubre que la víctima fue testigo de otro asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Ted Henderson muere en su propia casa y su cuerpo está desaparecido, mientras que dejan a su esposa y su hijo con vida, pero golpeados y atados.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: En los Everglades, cerca de un incendio controlado, Alexx y Delko registran la escena del crimen. Se ven obligados a protegerse cuando un muro de fuego los alcanza.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio llega rápidamente al lugar cuando asaltan a un camión blindado que transporta 3.2 millones de dólares en un atrevido atraco en el centro de la ciudad.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Wally Shmagin se convierte literalmente en parte de la escena de un crimen después de robar un guante de látex para agregarlo a su colección forense personal.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un periodista escurridizo es el único testigo de un asesinato y Horatio sospecha que puede estar buscando una historia mucho más importante.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a tiros a un oficial de policía mientras estaba en el trabajo, el equipo de CSI rastrea a los que él vio esa noche y se entera de que recogió a una prostituta.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga las vidas de quienes viven en un aeroparque de lujo después de que una avioneta se estrella en un lugar popular de Miami Beach.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Encuentran muerto a un guardia de seguridad después de que suenan disparos en el concierto de la estrella del rap 10-Large y llaman al equipo de CSI para investigar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando la evidencia de una investigación de asesinato lleva al equipo de CSI a creer que el asesino puede estar en Nueva York, Horatio lleva su investigación a la Gran Manzana.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Encuentran estrangulada a una actriz de cine para adultos en el parque y llaman al equipo de CSI para investigar y encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detectives Mac Taylor and Stella Bonasera uncover the body of a teenaged boy crammed into a 2’ x 2’ x 2’ box buried in the sand at Coney Island.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detectives Mac Taylor and Danny Messer find themselves on the trail of an elusive killer when an expectant bride drops dead on her wedding day.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: While investigating a truck-jacking, Detectives Mac Taylor and Stella Bonasera uncover a body pancaked underneath ten tons of steel.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When young gang members murder the owner of an upscale Bronx wine store, the CSIs must work to find evidence that ties someone to the crime.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A celebration for the release of a report on police corruption ends in bloodshed, when shots ring out on the 65th floor of a Midtown high rise.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detective Mac Taylor and Stella Bonasera discover a dead woman among the dirty sheets at an industrial laundry facility.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The home invasion murder of a college student sends Detectives on the trail of China White, uncut heroin that has fallen into the wrong hands.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: An armed suspect is uncovered at a secured crime scene. The routine investigation becomes a foot pursuit through the subway tunnels of New York City.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detectives discover the investigation of a vehicular homicide victim collides with a Boston Baseball fan found dead in a parking lot.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a casual breakfast turns into a shootout, Detective Mac Taylor must put the pieces of the crime back together again.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: It’s summer in the city as Mac and Hawkes investigate the suspicious death of a free climber attempting to scale the Empire State Building.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella and Danny investigate why a young, beautiful, and blind woman was left strangled on a rooftop. Did cuddle parties have anything to do with it?

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: It’s mayhem at the Bronx Zoo. Mac, Danny, and new CSI Lindsay Hamilton look into the death of a man thrown to the tigers.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A man found beaten to death at the San Gennaro festival leads Mac and Stella from the alleys of Mott Street to the power players of Wall Street.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Fin del juego (S8 Ep14)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se encuentra inmerso en el mundo de los videojuegos competitivos cuando descubre que un asesinato puede estar relacionado con un torneo de altas apuestas.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Caso cerrado (S8 Ep15)
programme.desc: Asesinan a un técnico de laboratorio en un caso que se parece a otro sin resolver de la década de 1950, el equipo de CSI vislumbra lo que sucede en las sombras del laboratorio.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Salud (S8 Ep16)
programme.desc: Una ola de brutalidad amenaza a una pequeña comunidad de la ciudad de Nueva York cuando encuentran un cuerpo descuartizado y estratégicamente abandonado en cuatro esquinas.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Obsequio de cumpleaños (S8 Ep17)
programme.desc: Llaman al equipo de CSI a un proyecto de viviendas en Brooklyn para investigar el asesinato de un exitoso empresario que se sintió atraído por su antiguo vecindario.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Cerca de la muerte (S8 Ep18)
programme.desc: Cuando Mac recibe un disparo, se encuentra en el limbo entre la vida y la muerte, mientras lucha por su vida, su equipo debe llevar al tirador ante la justicia.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Reavivó (S9 Ep1)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga cuando un jefe de bomberos, amigo de Mac, muere en un incendio provocado con la técnica que usó un pirómano recientemente liberado bajo palabra.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Donde hubo fuego… (S9 Ep2)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York se apresura para detener al pirómano en serie Leonard Brooks después de que empieza a usar el fuego contra personas de su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: CSI: New York: 4.700 kilómetros (S9 Ep3)
programme.desc: La evidencia encontrada en fotos en la escena de un crimen en el puente de Brooklyn envía a Mac y a Jo a San Francisco en busca de una adolescente desaparecida.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Sin palabras (S9 Ep4)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York se apresura para atrapar a un tirador cuando Lindsay resulta herida durante el intento de asesinato de un candidato político.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Idea equivocada (S9 Ep5)
programme.desc: Mac investiga un caso de hace 20 años que involucra a un niño desaparecido cuando encuentran asesinado al principal sospechoso en el aniversario de la desaparición del niño.

programme.title: CSI: New York: La dama del agua (S9 Ep6)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un cuento de hadas retorcido cuando encuentran a una mujer con un vestido de gala en el fondo del estanque fuera del castillo de Belvedere en el Central Park.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Juego mortal
programme.desc: Cuando los pacientes de un psiquiatra son asesinados sistemáticamente, el equipo de CSI se ve obligado a seguir el juego Cluedo para atrapar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Prueba de honor (S9 Ep8)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI debe adentrarse en el mundo de alta presión de las escuelas preparatorias de elite cuando un estudiante es asesinado mientras estudia para el examen de ingreso a la universidad.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Código sangriento (S9 Ep9)
programme.desc: Cuando descubren que la detective Lovato es una agente encubierta, el equipo de CSI investiga a la pandilla callejera latina en la que ella se infiltró.

programme.desc: Papote tiene un bar y emplea a menores que beban cerveza sin alcohol para atraer a más clientes. Por otro lado, Andrea contrató a Yamir, una médium, quien solo la toca con intenciones sexuales.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Edwin y Érica se pelean la custodia de una hija con un temperamento muy fuerte. Eduardo dejó a su hermano en México, años después se lo encuentra en Miami con otro género.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Marcos y Gabriela contratan un vientre de alquiler, pero notan que la gestora de la criatura no está bien de salud. Luis se casa con Edith para que lo reclame legalmente, pero ella se demora.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Se casaron, él la trajo a Miami y descubrió que estaba embarazada pero no de él. En otro caso, el hijo de Julia metió el pene en un camping gas para que la novia le hiciera sexo oral.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Samuel desapareció por un año y lo declararon muerto, pero regresa y descubre una nueva faceta de su esposa. Carlos era pareja de Sonia, pero se fue de casa con una de las hijas de ella.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Zully tiene una agencia de modelos de talla grande y despide a una de ellas por dar mal ejemplo. Claudia y su cuñada Penélope tienen diferencias personales y quieren vender un inmueble.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Alexa perdió su restaurante a causa de la influencia de Joshua, un joven que actúa con aires de superioridad. Isabella asistió con su novio a un club de intercambio de parejas y la violaron.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.desc: Una sirvienta embarazada del joven de la casa donde trabaja es despedida de su trabajo y un vecino abogado le ofrece su ayuda para hacer que el joven se comprometa con ella, o al menos darle una ayuda para criar a su hijo.

programme.title: Muchachos Impacientes

programme.title: Wild Bill

programme.title: El sol de cada mañana

programme.desc: La reunión de diez años de la secundaria genera sorpresas para un grupo de amigos. Los chicos declaran que están listos para ir de fiesta con las "chicas hermosas", pero en realidad, siguen teniendo dificultades para descifrar al sexo opuesto.

programme.title: El informante

programme.title: En el juego del asesino

programme.title: Ladrón que roba ladrón

programme.title: Cantinflas

programme.title: Una última y nos vamos
programme.desc: Un grupo de mariachis salen de casa por primera vez para competir en un certamen nacional en la ciudad de México. Los 8 hombres tienen que soportar muchos desafíos, lo que parece ser una oportunidad de su vida, pronto podría conducir al final del grupo.

programme.desc: A local election has the Bunker family in turmoil as Mike and Gloria are all for Claire Packer, a woman, which is why Archie is dead set against her. However, once down at the voting booths, Archie realizes that he can't vote because he isn't registered.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When a gangster who passes as Oliver's doppelganger arrives in town with his wife and partner to hide out from the law, a rumor spreads that Oliver is a cheat. Oliver seeks to save his good name, and Lisa tries figure out which Oliver is Oliver!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Eb believes he has found his destiny when an accounting course he has enrolled in turns out to be acting workshop. All the world's a stage. Ed dives into acting and turns every simple interaction at the Douglas farm into a starring role.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: There is the old adage that warns never to discuss politics with your spouse... but what if you are both running for the same office?! That predicament comes true when Oliver and Lisa face each other in the Hooterville mayoral election.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver refuses to take Lisa to New York City to attend the wedding anniversary of an old friend. Meanwhile, Eb, always up to something, has a new invisible friend named Charlie. To get her way, Lisa introduces her own invisible friend... Natasha.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa gives the financially-challenged Eb her engagement ring to present to Darlene, his longtime sweetheart, so that he can pop the question. The ring is reportedly valued at $2,000, however, when Darlene's father has it appraised, it's a shocker.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A juvenile gang causes trouble in a San Francisco neighborhood, culminating in a robbery that results in a death. Billy Wilson, who claims innocence, faces mounting evidence and a violent past as the judicial system determines his fate.

programme.title: Mannix

programme.title: Mannix

programme.title: Yuyu Hakusho

programme.title: To Your Eternity
programme.desc: An immortal being, with no emotions nor identity, is sent to Earth to preserve the world.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Aceitoso en la mañana
programme.desc: Cuando la policía recuperó el automóvil sumergido de un hombre al que se denunció su desaparición, esperaban encontrar su cuerpo, pero no estaba allí.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una niña de 13 años desapareció de su casa en Colorado y la única evidencia que dejó el secuestrador fueron tres huellas digitales en la cortina de una ventana.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En una noche con vientos en Kansas en 1995, un misterioso incendio arrasó con la casa de un doctor prominente. Entre los escombros, los investigadores encontraron evidencia que les dijo cómo comenzó el incendio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de que aparecen 10 cuerpos en Florida, una víctima – Lisa McVey de 17 años de edad – es secuestrada pero liberada. Ella lleva a la policía al autor del crimen, Bobbie Joe Long.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2005, David Castor sufrió una muerte lenta y agonizante durante varios días. Su esposa Stacey sostuvo que fue un suicidio, a pesar de que se hizo con un anticongelante.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una pequeña niña se enfermó y murió, los investigadores se vieron sorprendidos. ¿Fue un accidente, una enfermedad inexplicable o un asesinato?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando un policía fuera de servicio murió de un disparo, sus colegas oficiales estaban determinados a resolver el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de una Convención de Filadelfia, 180 legionarios contraen síntomas similares a la neumonía y 29 de ellos mueren. La determinación de un científico ayuda a identificar la causa de esta enfermedad mortal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación de un pediatra, provocada por la misteriosa muerte de uno de sus pacientes, conduce a un hospital de Texas donde la tasa de mortalidad pediátrica es más alta que en cualquier hospital del país.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de que una pelea callejera le quitó la vida a un campeón nacional de lucha libre, la policía tuvo que determinar si fue asesinado a sangre fría o en defensa propia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerta a la esposa de un dentista bien conocido, la policía se esfuerza por identificar a un sospechoso. Algunas fibras y un estudio de los patrones climáticos en la noche del asesinato abren el caso y revelan al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un joven sano muere misteriosamente mientras duerme y las pruebas de toxicología revelan una dosis letal de lidocaína en su sangre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando un miembro adinerado de la sociedad muere después de caer de las escaleras, los testimonios de los testigos contradicen la evidencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el año 2000, el cuerpo de la bailarina exótica Rachel Siani fue encontrado debajo de un puente de Nueva Jersey. Los investigadores se preguntaron si se había suicidado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando dos mujeres desaparecieron y luego fueron encontradas brutalmente asesinadas, la policía se preguntó si fueron víctimas de un crimen de odio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación de un choque mortal en 1983 causado por el equipo de seguridad de la reina de Inglaterra durante una visita a California.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El 12 de Mayo de 1994, Crystal Perry fue asesinado viciosamente en su casa en Bridgton, Maine. Michael Hutchinson, de 32 años, fue encontrado culpable del asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Sin oraciones
programme.desc: La fundadora de American Atheists desapareció en 1995 junto con uno de sus hijos y su nieta, junto con 500,000 dólares en monedas de oro. La policía se centró en varios sospechosos, incluyendo a David R. Waters, que trabajaba para los Ateos Americanos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1997, se encontró el carro de Kelly Eckart, con todas sus pertenencias aún dentro del mismo, después de haber trabajado un turno nocturno en Franklin, Indiana. Días más tarde, se encontró su cuerpo en un barranco aislado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una joven mujer asiste a los servicios religiosos de la tarde y luego desaparece. Cuando se encuentra su automóvil abandonado, el tanque está vacío y falta una lata de gasolina que tenía en su baúl para emergencias.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encontró a Janice Johnson muerta al pie de las escaleras del sótano. La policía de Nueva Escocia tuvo que desenredar las circunstancias que rodearon la muerte de Janice y responder a la pregunta: ¿Fue un accidente o un asesinato?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1993, Kathryn Bishop de 82 años es encontrada muerta en su hogar de Pennsylvania. Pequeñas pistas en el cuerpo de la víctima le dirán a la policía lo que pasó esa noche.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: De fotografía
programme.desc: Una adolescente de Modesto, California desapareció. No había señales de lucha en su casa y la policía sospechaba que ella simplemente se había escapado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La policía obtiene una pista sobre una pareja que desapareció en el fin de semana del Día de los Caídos durante un robo en marcha. La evidencia que se encuentra resuelve el brutal crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Genes delatores
programme.desc: Un perfil de comportamiento hizo que el Departamento de Policía de Baton Rouge buscara al hombre equivocado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se sospecha un juego sucio cuando Glenda Furch, una trabajadora de una fábrica de Fort Worth, desaparece después de completar su turno.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane wants to play football but since there is no girls team, then boys’ football it is. The Shep doesn’t like the idea one bit, but once Jane proves she’s faster, stronger, and more athletic than most of the team, he relents…

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Eager to make the most of her college experience, Liberty jumps at the chance to rush the most popular sorority at Smithdale. Determined to get in, Liberty slowly exchanges old habits and old friends (Manny and Emma) for sorority approved ones.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Peter begins a relationship with Mia and a friendship with Riley. Finding a balance between a new girlfriend and a new guy friend gets confusing, especially when Riley is suddenly kissing Peter.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Sav and Anya plan to celebrate their six-month anniversary on the school’s overnight trip. Only problem? Alli, Sav’s sister, convinces their parents to let her go on the trip on the condition that Sav spends every second with her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mia’s T-Bombz campaign is hitting the city and Degrassi. But Holly J has bigger and better things going on. She’s prepping the Power Squad for an out-of-town competition, and things are looking good.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner and Jane have plans for next year – she’ll start pre-law and he’ll attend Police College. When he doesn’t get in, he can’t bear to tell her, so he lies.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Desperate to win Jane back, Spinner sneaks into the Leadership Convention Jane is speaking at and proposes. When Jane turns him down, Spinner breaks up with her – nothing he does is ever good enough.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riley’s the star of Degrassi’s first-ever football game win! The Shep is floored at how much Riley’s improved.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare stands up for Connor when he receives unfair treatment from The Shep. The result of their peaceful protest? Detentions for everyone. No one is more frustrated by the detention than Alli. It wasn’t her idea to protest.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Pushed to the edge by Holly J, Alli begins posting nasty things about her on the “anti-Grapevine” blog, the underground school on-line site.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane admits to herself that her issues with her dad go deeper than the divorce – she thinks maybe he did things to her. Jane is very confused and feels alone. Lucas gives Jane a hard time for creating tension between mom and dad.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma’s tired of being referred to as Kelly’s girlfriend and Blonde Emma – she’s not even blonde anymore! Determined to create a distinct university identity, Emma borrows some pot that was gifted to Kelly and smokes up with Becca and Gwyneth.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alli wants Johnny to like her, a lot. She worries she’s going to lose him to an older more “experienced” girl so to make sure she keeps her man close, Alli decides to play with the big kids at a ravine party.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Stress is at an all-time high at Degrassi with exams approaching and course selections due for next term.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.desc: Jane and Spinner have been through so much together. They’re best friends. Jane’s just come out of a difficult year at home, so hanging out with Spinner is safe and… easy. That’s not a bad thing, right?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alli insists she’s done with Johnny. When she breaks into his locker to steal nude photos of herself back, she, in fact, realizes that she’s so not over him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.desc: UNIT have penetrated the heat barrier and launch an attack on the gargoyle, Bok. In the cavern, the Daemon Azal confronts the Doctor and the Master to decide the fate of mankind.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Day of the Daleks
programme.desc: When Sir Reginald Styles claims to have seen a ghost, UNIT is called in. The Doctor and Jo spend the night at Styles' house and become the target of an assassin.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Day of the Daleks
programme.desc: As captive of the guerrillas, the Doctor discovers they intend to change history. Jo is transported to the 22nd Century where she unwittingly gives vital information to the Daleks.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Day of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Doctor arrives in a bleak future where Earth is ruled by the Daleks and mankind is enslaved. Rescuing Jo, the two escape but the brutish Ogrons are in pursuit.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Day of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Controller betrays the Daleks and is exterminated. The Daleks travel back in time to the 20th Century to ensure that the peace conference fails.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Curse of Peladon
programme.desc: The planet Peladon is hoping to join the Galactic Federation. But King Peladon’s Chancellor has been murdered and it seems that the legendary royal beast, Aggedor is to blame.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Curse of Peladon
programme.desc: The work of the committee is hampered by sabotage, fear, and suspicion. The Doctor knows the Ice Warriors of old and believes that they may be the guilty party.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Curse of Peladon
programme.desc: The Doctor is sentenced to a fight to the death in the pit with the King’s champion, Grun. But the saboteur and killer is still at large.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Curse of Peladon
programme.desc: Hepesh, supported by the delegate from Arcturus, is revealed to be behind the attacks. Arcturus is killed but Hepesh escapes to rouse a rebellion against the King.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Sea Devils
programme.desc: The Doctor and Jo visit the Master who is held prisoner on an island. There they learn that several ships have recently been sunk in the area and the Doctor decides to investigate.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Sea Devils
programme.desc: The Doctor is eager to make peace between the Sea Devils and the humans but has discovered that the Master is up to his old tricks.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Sea Devils
programme.desc: Jo attempts to rescue the Doctor who is being held prisoner by the Master and Trenchard. The Master plans to summon the Sea Devils from beneath the waves.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Sea Devils
programme.desc: The Doctor attempts to persuade Captain Hart of the danger that the Master represents. Eager to make contact with the Sea Devils, the Doctor journey's to the sea bed.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Sea Devils
programme.desc: The Doctor is captured by the Sea Devils and taken to their undersea base. There, he tries to make peace with the creatures, but his efforts are thwarted by the Navy.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Sea Devils
programme.desc: The Sea Devils come to the surface and attack the Naval base. The Doctor is forced to create a machine that will awaken the creatures across the entire world.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Mutants
programme.desc: The Doctor is sent to a skybase orbiting the planet of Solos in the 30th century, where he must deliver a sealed message pod. Meanwhile, on the planet below, something is transforming the human population into hideous mutants.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Mutants
programme.desc: Ky flees to the planet's poisonous surface taking Jo with him while the Marshal, holding the Doctor captive, demands that he opens the message pod.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Mutants
programme.desc: The Doctor searches for Jo in the caves of Solos. In the shadows the mutants prepare to attack.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Mutants
programme.desc: The Doctor and Sondergaard make an amazing discovery in the caves of Solos while Jo falls into the Marshal's trap.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Mutants
programme.desc: The Marshal's plans for Solos go disastrously wrong. Can the Doctor save the doomed planet in time to save Jo's life?

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Mutants
programme.desc: The Marshal is on trial, with the Doctor as chief witness. But Jo and the Doctor's friends are the Marshal's prisoners. Will the Doctor dare to reveal the truth about the Marshal's crimes?

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Time Monster
programme.desc: Masquerading as research scientist, Professor Thascales, the Master is using a device called TOMTIT to summon an ancient and powerful creature from beyond time.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Time Monster
programme.desc: The Doctor tracks the Master down to the Newton Institute. There, after a disastrous attempt to summon Kronos, the Master prepares to use TOMTIT once again.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Time Monster
programme.desc: Krasis, High Priest of Atlantis has been summoned by the Master to help him find the crystal of Kronos. The Master uses TOMTIT to summon threats from the past to attack UNIT.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Time Monster
programme.desc: As UNIT approaches, the Master leaves for Atlantis in his TARDIS. However, the Doctor is not far behind and in the time vortex, the two Time Lords confront each other.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Time Monster
programme.desc: Arriving in Atlantis, the Master seduces the beautiful Queen Galleia so that he might possess the crystal of Kronos. But it is protected by a guardian who is half man, half beast.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Time Monster
programme.desc: With the crystal of Kronos in his possession, the Master prepares to release the Chronovore. The Doctor is powerless to stop his nemesis as the end of Atlantis approaches.

programme.desc: Chihuahua is a pint-sized peril to its owner's roommate; slobbering Great Dane afraid of shiny floors.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.desc: Josh, a Maltese-poodle mix, won't let anyone go near him with a brush; Boomer, a clownish dog, must always be the center of attention.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Harry goes crazy at anything on wheels; shadows drive Brooks crazy.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar tries to help a boxer named Coach before he is put down for biting someone; Sueki turns her nose up at leads.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target today seems to have a taste for drugs and a record of reckless driving. The hunt has deep emotional resonance for the team because today is the anniversary of the fatal car accident of Dog's daughter Barbara Katie.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What looks like a routine pick-up turns into a complicated case of betrayal, deceit, as well as quality nail care as Dog and company track down a fugitive alleged to be an abusive boyfriend with one too many friends in his close-knit community.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive has a bad reputation and a knack for running from the law. The pursuit has Dog and team traveling through an urban dystopia of suspicion, false leads and mistrust.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides he needs to help his son Garry believe in Santa Claus again. So now the Dog, with a posse expanded to include his children and grandchildren, sets off on a hunt through the Colorado Rockies for Santa Claus himself!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target for today has been in trouble with the law since he was a juvenile. And he seems willing to use any trick in the system to avoid capture by Dog. In this match of wits, will Dog prevail?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A fugitive from justice is on the lam, and it's Dog's job to find him. When they hit the last known address, they discover he already has pulled up stakes and left no forwarding address. The posse's one hope is to locate his girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: There is a running joke in the posse that every time Bobby Brown asks them for help with a fugitive, he always promises them that it's "an easy one," but the hunts end up being epic searches.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog believes in safety first, and today's hunt puts this philosophy to the test. The fugitive's problem with anger management increases the dangers of their already risky line of work. Dog warns the crew to be ready for anything as they head out.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today, Dog's bounty is about to take him on a trip down memory lane and test his investigative chops. With each lead propelling him closer and closer to his childhood haunts, Dog uses old-fashioned detective skills to track his prey.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is a big-hearted guy. He's helping Mary Ellen, his friend and fellow bondsman, on a dangerous night hunt for a fugitive she is now regretting bailing out. He's also giving his nephew Justin a second chance to rejoin the team.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Things are seldom what they seem in the world of bounty hunting. When the fugitive's girlfriend offers to help Dog trap this dangerous felon, Dog knows that someone is being deceived, the only question is whom?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that looks can be deceiving. The fugitive is pretty, petite, and trouble. She stands accused of settling an argument with the help of a box cutter. What Dog does not anticipate is how deceptive this femme fatale can truly be!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What do you do when you have a fugitive you not only want to find, but believe can be helped back onto the straight and narrow? If you're Mary Ellen, you call your good friend Dog.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Duty calls and the Chapmans are off on a hunt. The team chases a fugitive who has disappeared into a world of "no known" addresses.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Beth returns to the compound on the Big Island, she finds a damaged SUV and two possible culprits--Dog or Justin. Pressed by Beth, Dog offers a third option. The perpetrators are Hawaii's mythical mischief makers--the Menehune!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been quite a while since Tim Chapman put down his mace can and bulletproof vest to care for his growing family. When his old friend Dog calls asking for help tracking an elusive felon, Tim jumps into action.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With the aid of the runner's girlfriend, the posse heads out to bring a client with a checkered past in. Little does the team suspect that before the end of the day, Dog will be helping to mend a family torn apart by violence.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog tracks a fugitive who is on the run from the law for the first time. Reading the file Dog knows the young man's life is at the crossroads. Will he be able to track down this wanna-be-gansta in time to convince him to make the right choice?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For a guy who started life as a free spirited outlaw-biker, Dog has certainly turned into a family man. His children touch everything he does today, from searching for the perfect gift for his daughter Cecily's birthday to hunting a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The hunt for an elusive and clever criminal takes Dog through the world of a bantam fighting cock, a pregnant daughter, and a jungle safe house go together. And don't forget the mopeds as well as a group of hostile squatters on government land!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What's a father to do? When the cops ask Dog for help tracking down a renegade teen with a history of running hard, Baby Lyssa, eight months pregnant and counting, insists on joins the hunt. Can Dog keep his daughter safe and catch his man?

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: A labrador needs surgery after eating the sock her puppies were playing with, and Peter must find another way to feed a foal that is unable to ingest its mother's milk.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian must treat a pregnant heifer with a pelvis that may be too small to give birth, while a cat that lost a leg after being run over by a car suffers another injury in a road accident, but this time, no treatment may be possible.

programme.desc: Rupert the adored trekking llama is lame and in agony. Can Julian save Rupert's career? Peter pregnancy tests cows. But will all of Arthur's prized herd be in calf? Ruben the lurcher was rescued by elderly local farmers, Jean and Steve Green.

programme.desc: Summer has arrived in the Kalahari. It has been three weeks since the last rains and the desert is flourishing. A large group of giraffe have moved into the area which has been unsettling for the gang.

programme.title: Java In Jeopardy - Exploring The Volcano
programme.desc: Scientists regard it as one of the most dangerous volcanoes in the world. Time and again, it has proved its deadly potential – Merapi, the Fire Mountain of Java.

programme.title: EXTRAORDINARY HUMANS
programme.desc: Thom Hunt goes in search of a unique human, Eskil Ronningsbakken capable of balancing on the edge of the 100 metre vertical drop of the Puento Nuevo Bridge.

programme.title: Predators of a Different Kind - In the World of the Unknown Sharks

programme.title: Asia - Secret Lives, Hidden Places

programme.desc: Sage's troubles start trending; Dondre discovers that Janelle has been keeping a secret from him.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Amalia rompe con Rafael al enterarse que es un ladrón por boca de Susana. Teresa Cristina se cuela con Ro en la nueva mansión de Griselda con un plan macabro. Griselda pone a prueba a Iris con la ayuda de José. Esther y Juan Pablo hacen el amor.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Teresa Cristina y Ro hacen colapsar los baños de la nueva mansión de Griselda. Elsa le cuenta a Griselda que todo fue un plan de su patrona. El "Marido en Alquiler" arregla el desperfecto y le devuelve un putrefacto regalito a su elegante vecina.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Bárbara rechaza el dinero de Griselda y elige a su hijo. Kike la echa y ella le roba un beso. Patricia se cae al esquivar la moto de Rafael y podría perder a su bebé. Teresa Cristina y Griselda se unen para rezar. Reinaldo llega y las encuentra así.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Patricia pierde el bebé. Teresa Cristina se alegra, para ella es lo mejor que pudo haber pasado. Máximo se despide de sus fans y revela el carácter mezquino de Bárbara. Los fans la acorralan y quieren lincharla por su codicia y falta de escrúpulos.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Marisa le dice a Oscar que decidió no involucrar más a Cristóbal en su caso, mientras Cristóbal está enojado por lo que ella dijo en el programa de televisión. Richard alerta a Calixta sobre la cercanía del Polaco. Lalo dona su cabello.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Amelia reconoce la nobleza de Marisa al sacrificar el amor que siente por Cristóbal. Ella está empeñada en apartarlo de su lado, aunque él intenta convencerla de lo contrario. Lalo regresa a casa, pero en su vida no todo vuelve a la normalidad.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Sara le hace entender a Cristóbal que su separación de Marisa es lo mejor que puede pasar para su carrera política. Oscar se interesa en conocer el testimonio de Calixta. Estanislao pone en peligro a todos los que asisten al evento en el Cali Café.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Noche de miedo y desesperación en el Cali Café. Oscar persigue a quien inicia el fuego en el local. Calixta y Tania están atrapadas por el incendio. Cristóbal, Jerome y Oscar entran para salvarlas, mientras llegan los bomberos y paramédicos.

programme.desc: Alex courts disaster when he invites two dates to the senior prom. He devises an elaborate scheme for escorting each of the unknowing girls on a night to remember.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When Alex's pal Skippy discovers he's adopted, Alex helps him cope with the shocking news.

programme.desc: When Elyse has a convention speech in 'fascinating east coast resort' Atlantic City, she didn't plan to waste any time and money gambling.

programme.desc: Steven and Elyse plan a nostalgic weekend with the kids before the baby arrives, and are crushed to discover that the children are not at all interested in reminiscing about old times-they'd rather be with their friends.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be hanging by their ankles from a crane above the water. Couples must sit inside a barrel in a kneeling position. Contestants are driving on a swervy course while trying to run through a series of barrels and wooden structures.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be laying on their back on a plexi-glass platform that is hung from a helicopter. Contestants will determine how much of the animals they will have to eat. Contestant will have to cross beams placing flags along the way.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this couples stunt, partners will hang by their ankles, they will each hold onto one end of a rope and be lifted over the water. Couples will use their mouths to root around in pies made from wax worms, pigs stomach, fish sauce and duck tongue.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be placed on a 20 foot rope ladder. Contestants play a game to determine quantity of food they will have to eat. Contestant must walk across a 12 inch wide and 60 foot long beam suspended 100 feet in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The contestant will fire a starter's pistol and run from an attack dog. The contestants will lie in a pit made up of faux rocks and burlap. A 6 and a half inch wide beam is suspended over 100 feet in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Child contestant will be standing on top of the light tower while the parent is hanging from a helicopter. The parent contestant will be peddling a stationary bicycle. The child is standing on the roof and their parent is navigating through a maze.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be standing on the platform that is suspended. Contestants will lick bugs off of ropes. A glass tube is suspended vertically from a crane with the top sealed and the bottom open and submerges in a pool.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be placed on a platform floating in the water, where they will grab a skid of the helicopter. Player is chained between two poles and covered with bees. Contestants will be seated in the front of a car suspended over the water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Playmates Super Bowl Special Part 2

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants are placed in a box with two plexi-glass walls that will be lifted off the ground. Contestants will be served live snails. Contestants are seated in a car that is in the back of a semi truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Two contestants are seated in the front of a car. The driver is blind folded and the passenger must navigate for them. Player is strapped down in a coffin and then covered with 500 Tarantulas.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To jump from moving helicopter onto a floating platform. Place 60 pink toed tarantulas into torture hat and stay still for 3 minutes. The contestant lies in a plexi-glass tube as water is pumped in.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be locked in a plexi-glass box that will be hung from a crane, lowered into the water. A contestant bobs into a tank of fluid. One will be driving the main car and the other will be driving the ramp car along a flatbed semi truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The parents my make their way across the ledge of the Universal Orlando while their child stands on their shoulders. The mother son team must retrieve keys. Contestants are seated in a car and must and lock it into position underneath a moving semi-truck.
