programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: An errant angel has been on probation for two centuries because he's always breaking the rules.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A father attempts to have a memorial made to commemorate his son who was killed in Vietnam.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark asks Jonathan to help erase everything bad that's happened to him recently. Mark's idea is to create his own vision of heaven on Earth.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The angels help a distraught couple deal with a family tragedy that threatens to destroy their marriage

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The angels converge on a small town in Texas to witness a Christmas miracle

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica must convince a successful young attorney to give up an obsessive love for the man who ruined her life

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica tries to convince a cynical network television executive to produce a show about angels

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Michaela is kidnapped by the dog soldiers, and Sully vows to find her before she is killed.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Jake runs for mayor against a surprising candidate--Dr. Quinn.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Hank, distraught over Myra quitting, ends up comatose.

programme.title: Drive
programme.desc: When a prototype 'enhanced human' on the run from hit men hooks up with a dread-locked bystander, the two elude their pursuers. Starring Brittany Murphy ("8 Mile").

programme.title: Master Z: Ip Man Legacy
programme.desc: Legendary action director Yuen Woo Ping draws on a stellar cast (Michelle Yeoh, Dave Bautista, Tony Jaa, and Max Zhang) to create a hard-hitting martial arts blast worthy of its place in the celebrated IP MAN universe.

programme.title: DOA: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: The world's best fighters are invited to DOA, a martial-arts tournament. Four female rival fighters, an aristocratic warrior, a wrestling superstar, an athlete with a tragic past, and an assassin-for-hire, work together to uncover a secret.

programme.title: Universal Soldier
programme.desc: A woman reporter discovers a Defense Department project to create androids from the bodies of Vietnam soldiers, to be then used as an elite anti-terrorism unit.

programme.title: Cyborg
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this adrenaline-charged sci-fi thriller as Gibson Rickenbacker, the future's most fearsome warrior. In the wake of a plague, Rickenbacker must rescue the only person who can develop a vaccine and save civilization.

programme.title: Timecop
programme.desc: Max Walker, an officer for a security agency that regulates time travel, must fend for his life against a shady politician who's intent on changing the past to control the future.

programme.title: Universal Soldier
programme.desc: A woman reporter discovers a Defense Department project to create androids from the bodies of Vietnam soldiers, to be then used as an elite anti-terrorism unit.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay regresa a Lido di Manhattan, Anna Vincenzo's y Le Bistro para ver si los propietarios han implementado sus cambios. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: The Secret Garden" es un romántico restaurante francés que está al borde de la quiebra. El chef Ramsay causa revuelo cuando sugiere cambiar la decoración fea, el menú y la cocina sucia.

programme.title: Fuera de carta
programme.desc: Francesco nos muestra la leche de tigre del mercado de Surquillo como inspiración para mostrarnos tres leches de tigre diferentes: conchas, jalapeños y langostinos.

programme.title: Fuera de carta
programme.desc: Nuestro chef, Francesco de Sanctis, nos enseña a hacer un arroz con pollo para su familia con todo el estilo de su restaurante Sibaris.

programme.title: Fuera de carta
programme.desc: El chef, Francesco de Sanctis, sale de su cocina en Sibaris para ir a Wingman en Miraflores para mostrarnos cómo hacer alitas al estilo amazónico.

programme.title: Fuera de carta
programme.desc: El chef Francesco de Sanctis prepara lasaña de panqueques con tocino a la boloñesa, perfecta para el brunch.

programme.title: Fuera de carta
programme.desc: El chef Francesco de Sanctis visita Walqa y prepara cuencos de poke.

programme.title: Fuera de carta
programme.desc: El chef, Francesco de Sanctis, visita a su amigo M y juntos preparan Tiradito Nikkei y power sushi.

programme.title: Fuera de carta
programme.desc: El chef, Francesco de Sanctis, visita a su amiga Patty y juntos preparan un delicioso crumble de manzana y panqueques de helado.

programme.title: Fuera de carta
programme.desc: El chef Francesco de Sanctis nos abre las puertas de su restaurante y hace un delicioso gazpacho de tomate y calabaza.

programme.title: Media hora y listo!
programme.desc: ¡Es noche de bar en la cocina de Spencer Watt! ¡Olvídese de salir, las recetas del bar de Spencer son atrevidas en sabor y ligeras para la billetera!

programme.title: Media hora y listo!
programme.desc: En menos de 30 minutos, el chef Spencer Watts prepara cuatro sabrosos, ricos y deliciosos platillos franco-canadienses.

programme.title: Media hora y listo!
programme.desc: ¡En solo 30 minutos, el chef Spencer Watts prepara una fiesta con sabores mexicanos para cuatro personas!

programme.title: Media hora y listo!
programme.desc: ¿Una cena marroquí en treinta minutos? Así es! Spencer Watts se inspira en platos marroquíes que son rápidos de hacer y audaces en su sabor.

programme.title: Media hora y listo!
programme.desc: El chef Spencer Watts ofrece sus consejos y trucos para una clásica cena de hamburguesas y papas fritas con un toque saludable.

programme.title: Media hora y listo!
programme.desc: Es noche de comida para llevar: ¡Tandoori!, el chef Spencer Watts prepara cinco platos indios rápidos y fáciles que toman poco tiempo, pero son muy buenos en sabor.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay debe trabajar con un chef testarudo y propietarios sin experiencia para realizar algunos cambios y traer de vuelta a los clientes a Seascape.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay se dirige a Fair Lawn, Nueva Jersey, para encontrarse con un personal de meseros indiferentes que lastima al restaurante italiano Campania's.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita Peter's, un restaurante italiano familiar en Babylon, Nueva York. Descubre que el restaurante se está hundiendo debido a su descarado gerente y copropietario.

programme.title: Cocina latina: Recetas Tradicionales Venezolanas
programme.desc: Juan Pablo González nos ofrece una muestra de la cocina casera venezolana con recetas tradicionales, desde una sopa de calabaza reconfortante y saludable hasta un flan dulce de maracuyá.

programme.title: Cocina latina: Cena, Estilo Venezolano
programme.desc: El anfitrión Juan Pablo González nos muestra cómo impresionar a los invitados con una deliciosa comida venezolana de cuatro platos.

programme.title: Cocina latina: Tapas Españolas
programme.desc: ¿Cena por la noche con amigos? Las tapas los sacarán de apuros y el chef español Luis “Tigretón” León nos muestra cuatro platos tradicionales deliciosos.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Witnesses saw a woman in the back of a truck, flailing her arms and screaming. When they found a jacket near a pool of blood, they knew what they had seen wasn't a joy ride.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The disappearance of Philadelphia college athlete Aimee Willard is investigated after her car is found on the roadside. When her body is found, the police find unusual marks and DNA evidence that eventually lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman's death in Pennsylvania triggers a homicide investigation into another woman's death in North Carolina. Faced with striking similarities, examiners must determine if their suspect's story about accidental drowning is all wet.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It's usually easy to determine how a criminal entered the crime scene. But in this case, it looked as if the killer vanished into thin air — and perhaps he had.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot
programme.desc: Police were puzzled by an obscure print found at a crime scene where one man had been killed and two teenage girls were seriously injured. Neither of the girls could identify their attacker, but one simple clue helped track the footsteps of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Several suspects and conflicting evidence complicated a brutal murder investigation. But the forensics were clear on one thing: the killer knew his victim, and that alone gave investigators a head start.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Authorities track a kidnapper who let his victim write a last will and informed the family of her murder. A phone number written on a previous page left a lasting impression, which helped to convict.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called about a dead body, a background check on the victim leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks — all fronted by elderly couple Ray and Faye Copeland.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While skeet shooting on a beautiful spring day, Martin Dillon is shot dead. His friend maintains it was a freak accident, but it takes more than 20 years for the truth to surface.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, Palm Beach waitress Denise O'Neill is abducted and murdered. Her neighbor Luis Caballero arouses suspicions by behaving oddly toward TV crews covering the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police investigate a missing college girl and discover her double life: attending school by day and working as a call-girl by night. Her body is found and investigators find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1986, Gary Dale Larson was stabbed to death in his Edmond, Oklahoma home. The killer then sexually assaulted Larson's girlfriend, Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1980, Michigan resident Shannon Mohr died in what her new husband, David Davis, reported to be a horseback riding accident. After her death, Shannon's family reported that Davis seemed far from grief-stricken.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A police officer accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide. Investigators say it was murder — that it was physically impossible for the woman to have shot herself.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The decomposed body of a young woman was discovered in a Bakersfield irrigation canal. If there was trace evidence, it had been washed away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a popular disc jockey was found murdered in a community garden, police swung into action. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert led police to the killer, who had been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mother of two vanishes after a shopping trip. Her body is discovered a month later, and witnesses say they saw the victim being forced into a car by an unknown person.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a mini-vacation in Key West. The wife went missing and police searched every square inch of the island; they found nothing but a pair of sandals which might have belonged to her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For years, a woman suffered from what appeared to be the unpleasant side effects of lithium, a drug prescribed to treat bipolar disorder. When she died, investigators had to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, San Francisco pornographer Artie Mitchell was murdered in his home. His brother and business partner, who was found near the scene carrying a rifle, later confesses to shooting Artie.The question is whether the shooting was premeditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 6-year-old girl ran and hid when she saw her grandmother being beaten to death, but the man followed, beat and assaulted her. She said the assailant was her uncle, who was later convicted. She recanted her testimony years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a college student is found dead, evidence suggests that he knew his killer. With just three hairs and some microscopic cells, police unravel a web of lies and find the motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For 15 months, a serial killer was strangling prostitutes in Florida, then taunting police by leaving the bodies in plain sight. The only clues were a tire impression and some threads.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A killer tries to incinerate everything that could link him to his crime. But in doing so, he inadvertently creates new forensic evidence. Detectives employ a technique never before used in a criminal investigation to bring it to light.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1989, the dead bodies of Joan Rogers and her two teenage daughters were found floating in Tampa Bay.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Survivors of Nazi atrocities recognized Archbishop Trifa, former head of the Romanian Orthodox Church in America, as having directed a bloody attack against Jews during World War II. He was deported in 1984 and died three years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Kristine Fitzhugh failed to show up for her music class, her husband found her dead at the bottom of the stairs of their Palo Alto home. Further investigation reveals evidence of murder in the kitchen.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: After a Philadelphia Convention, 180 Legionnaires contract pneumonia-like symptoms and 29 of them die. The determination of one scientist helps identify the cause of this deadly disease.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned, but her slightly damaged bicycle was found nearby.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: While skeet shooting on a beautiful spring day, Martin Dillon is shot dead. His friend maintains it was a freak accident, but it takes more than 20 years for the truth to surface.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: In 1996, police received a call from Darlie Routier telling them of her two sons' murders. The police found the killer by analyzing blood spatter, doing behavioral profiling and analyzing Darlie's 911 call.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: When Joann Katrinak is found dead in a corn field with her infant son, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue which uncovers a twisted story of passion gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Using Mack's internal CPU to replay highlights from their Ranger careers, the team take the time to refresh their memories as to who has the Corona Aurora jewel.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Using the Octavian Chalice, the Rangers journey to Greece in an attempt to find the next jewel via an ancient ritual. But Kamdor and Miratrix interrupt the ceremony, making their ultimate stand against their enemies!

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: The Rangers return to Egypt, then travel to Japan, and back again, all in their heated quest to find the key to unlock the last hidden jewel. But despite the ground covered, is it actually closer to home than they realize?

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: With the ultimate power of the completed Corona Aurora at his disposal, Flurious freezes all of San Angeles and prepares to conquer the world in his new form. The Rangers must use their powersl to make their final stand against him.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Theo, Lily, and Casey, members of the secretive kung fu academy Pai Zhuq (Order of the Claw), are chosen ones to become the latest guardians of the ancient imprisoned spirit, Dai Shi.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: With Mantor still plaguing the city, the Rangers are in desperate need of learning the ability to bring themselves up to his size. RJ refuses to teach his new pizza parlor employees/students this skill, until they can master individual weapons.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Casey requests extra training from RJ, and ends up doing seemingly menial housework for the mentor. The ancient spirit of the buffalo is harnessed for evil, as Camille brings about Buffalord.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The 5 Fingers of Poisons (lizardlike Gakko, cobraesque Naja, centipedish Rantipede, scorpionic Stingerella, and froggy Toady) are brought forth by Dai Shi, who doubly stuns the Rangers by finally revealing his human form to a familiar face.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The second Finger of Poison, Gakko, uses his wall-sticking skills to humiliate the Rangers when they try to face him on his own turf.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The friendship between Theo and Lily is tested by the Yellow Ranger's budding platonic relationship with Casey.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: With RJ out of town, Casey is left in charge of Jungle Karma Pizza. Instead of asserting himself as the boss, he adds the power of responsibility equally to Theo and Lily, which quickly creates chaos in the pizza parlor.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The heavily armored Pangolin proves to be too tough of a nut for the Rangers to crack. Their only hope is a powerful weapon called the Jungle Mace, which lies in the hands of retired Pai Zhuq teacher, Master Phant.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Casey loses his $5 tip to a young boy named Josh, who wants to buy himself a kite. Can Casey teach Josh that the easy way isn't always the right way, while also figuring out how to put a stop to the slippery Slickagon?

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Theo spreads his focus too thin, leading his teammates to question his effectiveness in battle.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Thanks to Carnisoar's training, Jarrod has become more ruthless than ever. Camille is pushed aside for the last time, and thanks to some advice from Lily, decides to get a new master.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Casey anxiously awaits the arrival of his second master, but RJ begins to feel forgotten as a result. It gets worse for him when the master of the Shark technique arrives, and turns out to be his estranged father, Master Finn!

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: After another victorious battle against Camille's monsters, the Rangers feel they are unstoppable. RJ warns them about being overconfident. He tells them to train on their basic stances.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: With RJ captured, the Rangers must travel to the spirit world to find the last 3 remaining masters. Theo, Lily, and Casey must face their own childhood fears in order to pass their test.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Everyone is still making fun of Lily for being too nice. After a battle with Porcupongo, Lily is fed up with being so nice and shows her bad side. Lily becomes a rude customer at JKP and refuses to help the other Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: After his last battle with Dai Shi, RJ has major problems controlling his animal spirit. He turns into a werewolf and becomes a big threat to anyone around him. RJ learns to lean on his friends and not run away from them when he has a problem.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Casey really has grown up from being a cub at Pai Zhuq. He's taken initiative and stepped up to being the leader of the group. But now with RJ as a Ranger, things are a little different. Casey feels like a cub all over again.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Grizzaka sends an evil spirit to cause trouble between RJ and his animal spirit again. The hero in RJ causes him to save Flit. RJ tells the spy to go home but Flit tells of his own curse.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Dominic was sent out by Master Mao to find purpose for his life. He finds out that RJ and the others are really Power Rangers and he wants to join them. He now knows that this is his purpose in life.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Jarrod has found the Rhino Nexus. All he needs is the Control Dagger key to tap into the power. Dominic is startled by a dream of Master Mao telling him to protect the Control Dagger as it holds the key to his destiny.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: With Control Dagger in hand, Dai Shi aims to unlock the Nexus for himself. The Overlords refuse to let such power fall into the hands of the Rangers or Dai Shi.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The Phantom Beasts were a notorious force in the Beast Wars. The crystal eyes hold the power to bring back these Phantom Beasts. Our heroes must protect these eyes before Dai Shi or the Overlords resurrect such evil beasts.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The Phantom Beasts have been brought back to life. Dai Shi has them prove their loyalty by capturing the three masters. The Phantom Beasts capture the masters and use the masters to create the Spirit Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The Phantom Beasts control the masters and call forth the Spirit Rangers. They look and fight exactly like Power Rangers. Our heroes are in for a real fight as they face the spirits of their own masters.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The Spirit Rangers could be the end of our heroes if something isn't done. RJ takes the risk of destroying his father. Trusting his instincts, he finds that his dad was prepared if this should happen.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The Rangers get sucked into a cheesy game show about the past season. Camille hosts the game show and a wrong answer could result in being cancelled!

programme.title: Formula 1 Racing

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Lemp Mansion

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS is asked to investigate the abandoned Milton School in Alton, Ill. where some studentsare said to still be walking through the halls.

programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS returns to Mansfield, Ohio to investigate the Bissman Building, where the current manager, Ellis Byrd, was nearly choked to death by a black mist.

programme.desc: Lou mistakenly sends Mrs. Roach’s horse, Swallow, home before his fear of traffic is cured. An unknowing Ashley is violently thrown off when the horse is spooked by a truck.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: In order to drum up business for Heartland, Lou is organizing an open house. Amy is totally against it. After all, she’s managed to drum up some high-profile clients on her own.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lisa Stillman sends her nephew Ben to live at Heartland. While Amy and Lou are cleaning out Marion’s old room in preparation for Ben’s arrival, they come across an old letter written by their dad.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When Lou decides to make a promotional video to advertise Heartland, nobody is very supportive of the idea. But Lou is determined, perhaps even more than usual.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lou's boyfriend, Carl, comes for a visit and his big-city plans clash with the ranch's more laid-back lifestyle. Amy is puzzled by why a new horse at Heartland won't obey commands.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lou isn’t pleased when a neighboring rancher brings a pregnant mare to stay at Heartland.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los competidores deben crear perros calientes de proporciones perfectas para las celebridades Drew Lachey, John O'Hurley, Tom Green, Melinda Clarke, Christopher 'Kid' Reid y Kristy Swanson.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los doce Chefs restantes deberán planificar un saludo gastronómico por el regreso de un marine americano. El equipo perdedor tendrá que limpiar y decorar la fiesta de Tana Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los Chefs restantes deben crear comidas de tres platos que sumen solo 700 calorías. Los ganadores fueron a la playa con la jugadora de voleibol de playa Annett Davis.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los Chefs restantes tiran los dados para determinar qué ingredientes usar para su plato de desafío. El equipo ganador gana un viaje a Las Vegas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los nueve Chefs restantes realizan una prueba de sabor a ciegas. Los ganadores cenan con el Chef Ramsay en un comedor completamente oscuro donde no pueden ver lo que están comiendo.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los Chefs restantes hacen crepes. Los ganadores cenarán en un restaurante francés mientras los perdedores se preparan para un servicio de cena con temática francesa.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los medallistas olímpicos de invierno Sasha Cohen y Jonny Moseley aparecen como jueces invitados. Para este desafío, todos los ingredientes deben provenir de Whistler, B.C.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los seis participantes restantes deben replicar los platos que les preparó el Chef Ramsay. Los ganadores cenarán con la ganadora de la cuarta temporada, Christina Machamer.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El desafío para cada uno de los concursantes restantes es hacer un plato que se vea y sepa igual. Los expertos de la revista 'Bon Appetit' ayudan al Chef Ramsay a juzgar.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los participantes conocen una versión en miniatura del Chef Ramsay: el actor y chico impresionista británico Felix Light. Deben preparar comidas sin carne para él y otros ochenta jóvenes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la primera parte del final de temporada, los tres concursantes restantes deberán preparar un plato con ingredientes de todo el mundo. Los jueces son un grupo de expertos culinarios internacionales.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la parte final del final de temporada, los Chefs finales deben preparar platos dignos de Araxi, el restaurante y bar de ostras donde el ganador será el Chef.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día uno
programme.desc: Doce chefs compiten para impresionar a Gordon Ramsay. Ellos trabajan para abrir un renombrado restaurante en Los Ángeles. Ahí se descubre la próxima estrella culinaria.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día dos
programme.desc: Después de apenas sobrevivir la noche de apertura del restaurante Hell's Kitchen, los concursantes se preparan para su segundo servicio de cena.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Nya digitizes Jay and uploads him into Zane’s mind. Jay reviews memories of the Ninja’s various motorcycles, mechs and planes in order to solve the vehicle-themed puzzle.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Garmadon travels back in time in order to undo the past and rid the Ninja from the future, the Ninja follow him and try to stop him by using the Golden Weapons from the past to clash against Garmadon’s Mega-Weapon.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja face off with an exhibit of a Stone Samurai Warrior that the toxic venom from the Great Devourer has brought to life while Garmadon manages to find a fabled Dark Island that is said to hold dark powers.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja try to flee from the rest of the Stone Army that has been brought to life by the Devourer’s toxic venom - and things get a lot worse when Garmadon arrives with a ‘Helmet of Darkness’ and seizes control of the Stone Army.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninjas, Lloyd, Sensei Wu and Misako journey to the Dark Island to find a ‘Temple of Light’ that can restore the Ninjas’ elemental powers but are attacked by Starteeth (barnacle-like star fish) that start eating through their ship.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After battling off Garmadon’s Stone Army, the Ninjas finally arrive at the Temple of Light where they harness their pure elemental powers, concentrating them onto Lloyd who becomes more powerful than he ever imagined.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the Ninjas’ attempt to return Garmadon’s ‘Helmet of Darkness’ to its perch at the Celestial Clock in order to prevent the final battle between Lloyd and his father from beginning fails, a Super Weapon is created that can destroy all of Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Garmadon uses his new Super-Weapon to turn Jamakai Village evil, he unwittingly unsettles the balance, allowing the spirit of the Overlord to cross over and possesses his body.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: A great darkness has fallen upon Ninjago as Garmadon’s Super-Weapon has turned it evil but Lloyd and the Ninjas discover that light is more powerful than dark - and the final and ultimate battle is on.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After a time of peace, the Ninja are called back into action. The spirit of the defeated Overlord has infected the electric grid of Ninjago and is using all available technology to exact his revenge on Lloyd.

programme.title: Chely Wright: Wish Me Away
programme.desc: After a lifetime of hiding, Chely Wright became the first commercial country music singer to come out as gay, shattering cultural stereotypes within Nashville and within herself.

programme.title: Cher: In Her Own Words
programme.desc: Cher, the star who refused to be boxed in, stood up to conformity, and championed female independence. Proving the doubters wrong with every change of direction. Her influence on women in the industry, and direction of modern music is incalculable.

programme.title: Cher: Life in the Spotlight
programme.desc: A legendary musician, a timeless icon, Cher has secured her legacy amongst the stars. Starting out as a young girl with crippling stage fright, evolving into one of the most recognised figures in Hollywood.

programme.title: Metallica: Masters of Metal
programme.desc: They are one of the most influential heavy metal bands of all time. Alongside Slayer, Anthrax, and Megadeth, the Masters of Metal are an important part of the "big four".

programme.title: David Bowie: Stardust
programme.desc: 'The Rise and Fall of Ziggy Stardust and the Spiders from Mars' is arguably the most influential albums in the mind-blowing career of David Bowie.

programme.title: David Bowie: On the Rock Trail
programme.desc: Some say that youth is wasted on the young, but this could never be said of Rock icon David Bowie. His distinctive music, exotic appearance and wild boy lifestyle defined an entire generation through the glamorous, hedonistic 1970s.

programme.title: David Bowie: Out of This World
programme.desc: Few artists marked the 20th century like David Bowie did. He was an astonishing and eclectic performer. He was a true artist in every sense of the word. Infinitely changeable and unpredictable, he remains immortal in the people's heart.

programme.title: David Bowie: The Man Who Stole the World
programme.desc: Today the world mourns one of the most iconic musical heroes, David Bowie. With the news of his passing flooding newspaper headlines and millions of fans paying tribute to him on social media, his departure has left a mark on many all over the world.

programme.title: Daydream Believers: The Monkees Story
programme.desc: The true story of four hopeful young singers who are brought together by NBC as a singing group, a group manufactured to be the American alternative to the Beatles.

programme.title: Prince: Kiss the Rain
programme.desc: Few artists are as prolific as Prince. The king of self-transformation, Prince made his mark on an entire generation. He redefined popular music and reshaped the music industry. But the enigma of Prince held many untold secrets- join us on this in-dept...

programme.title: Santana: Live At US Festival
programme.desc: From award-winning filmmaker and rockumentarian Glenn Aveni, Santana: Live At US Festival offers a tremendous performance from the legendary Carlos Santana, rivaling his set at Woodstock for its energy, excitement, and inspiring musicianship

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Nightlight Mask murdered the Duke of Le Mond and stole his diamonds. ICPO is having trouble solving the case, so they induct mystery author Conan Dorill as a special inspector. Dorill deduces that the true identity of Nightlight Mask is Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: On a night of thunder and rain, a man gives Lupin a doll. The next day there is a news report that a diamond called the Phoenix's Tear had been stolen. Lupin's been caught on security cameras, but he has no recollection of having done the deed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin's target is the Vatican Crown, located at the North Pole. He devises a plan to thwart pesky Fujiko, which is to relocate penguins at the South Pole to the North Pole.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The World Crime Prevention Devices Association has developed the "killer safe" that sent many safe crackers to their graves. But Lupin takes the challenge to steal what it guards.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin crashes crime boss Markane's masquerade party, but the party was just a ruse to entrap Lupin. Lupin gets hung by rope in the dark and is made the target of Markane's murder game in ten rounds, of which players have to hit the target.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin gets called out to New York where he rescues a girl hunted by an organization called Red Spider. Lupin does everything he can to help the poor girl suffering from amnesia; he tries hypnosis on her but to no avail, he gets hypnotized instead.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Old man Piccolo had taught Lupin the art of thievery 15 years ago. Learning that his widowed wife had all of her belongings impounded by the police, Lupin promises her to get them all back.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and crew sneak into Peking's Imperial Palace Museum to steal Emperor Shi's jade Mahjong set, but winds up getting chased by a gang.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Look who is flying above New York; it's Superman! All he does is fly around, but the town is in a panic because of his performance. In the meantime, a lot of banks get robbed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin steals a statue called the Stone Child from the Metropolitan Art Museum; he and Fujiko make their getaway in a Cessna, but they crash at the Bermuda Triangle. They encounter a ghost ship at this grave of many ships and planes.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Foodie and gourmet aficionado Baron Gourmel says he wants to eat Lupin's brain. He claims he'd offer his own 70-million dollar jewelry collection to anyone who could capture Lupin. Fujiko hears of it and informs Lupin right away.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin III learns that his grandfather Arsène Lupin's secret treasures are buried in his grave. Lupin learns of its location with Fujiko's microfilm.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen are surrounded, as usual, as they are trying to escape after a jewelry theft. But somebody shoots at Zenigata and hits him dead on. Lupin learns of the even the next morning in the papers, and Fujiko and Goemon get implicated.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The prime minister of the Duchy of Blanco has a one-of-a-kind gold coin of Hannibal hidden in his chest; well, Lupin and crew are after it. Amidst their scheming, Jigen is challenged to a duel with a man named Stoneman.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The prime minister of France has run up a ridiculous tab with Maxim of Paris, and orders the Louvre Museum proprietor to sell a painting to cover his bill. But the proprietor doesn't want to let it go, and takes the painting out of the museum.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin recieves a letter about Marie Antoinette's jeweled crown, and sneaks into the palace of Versailles. A young man called Oscar appears, the sender of the letter.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin was told by Fujiko to steal a pistol of the Wilhem family worth 500 million pounds. Meanwhile, a man named Jim Benkei, a giant of a man who's stirred troubled in London, steals Jigen's favorite Magnum ...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is after the various jewels at the World Fair in Los Angeles. Lupin learns from Fujiko that a man named Harry Satler is also after the jewels, so he decides to go see who this guy is. The man he meets is a wizened old man…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Pestered by Fujiko, Lupin has to steal a golden bed that was originally made by Louis XIV for Josephine. He makes a plan with Jigen and Goemon, but the owner of the bed, Morgan, is a formidable opponent who has WWII military experience.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Heike Clan and Minamoto Clan once battled on Devil's Head Island at the inland sea of Seto; Fujiko and Lupin go there to find out about the details behind the legend of the battle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Vivian dreams of becoming a star some day, but her auditions are a bust. She thinks of using Lupin to become famous; she makes Lupin engage in thievery, and informs reporters to be at the site to catch him in the act.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Louis XIV and Marie Antoinette's Hope Diamond has brought much misfortune on its possessors. The diamond is now safeguarded by a maximum security device. Fujiko provokes Lupin to steal that diamond.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and crew go to a hot spring. Lupin and Jigen relax while Goemon trains at the cliffs. A girl manifests to Goemon and captures Goemon's heart. However, the girl is seeking the secret of his sword, for her swordsmith grandfather…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has to battle a hitman called Tiger. Lupin tries to dodge him, but Tiger is one step ahead of him. Lupin keeps trying to escape him but Tiger is relentless; he has a way of disappearing and appearing at will.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and friends go to have fun at the horse race track, but winning isn't as easy as stealing. Lupin notices two people who are winning big money hand over fist, and gets suspicious.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Catherine rescues Lupin and Jigen, who are pursued by Zenigata as usual. She's an old acquaintance of Jigen's, and provokes Jigen to steal a 140-karat diamond from her own mansion.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Wolf and Rose are a cool hitmen duo with the ambition of rising to the top of the hitman business by killing Lupin. They capture Goemon and torture him to confess about Lupin's weaknesses. Lupin learns that Goemon is in danger.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/8/22: Down four runs late, Seattle rallies back with a four-run 8th inning and Adam Frazier drives in the winning run with an RBI double in the 9th to send the Mariners to the American League Divisional Series.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/11/22: After being down four runs in the 8th inning, Yordan Alvarez crushes a walk-off three-run homer in the 9th to lift the Astros to victory in Game 1 of the ALDS against the Mariners.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/19/22: Manny Machado rips three hits and a home run while Blake Snell strikes out six batters to lead the Padres to an 8-5 win over the Phillies in Game 2 of the NLCS.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/22/22: Rhys Hoskins, Kyle Schwarber and J.T. Realmuto all homer to help the Phillies outslug the Padres in a 10-6 NLCS Game 4 win.

programme.title: Side Hackers

programme.desc: Joel and the Bots get tips on public speaking from the short Speech: Using Your Voice and watch a spider devour a town in Earth vs the Spider (1958)

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000

programme.title: MST3K Shorts

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Black Scorpion
programme.desc: Giant scorpions rise out of a volcano and attack Mexico in The Black Scorpion (1957) while the Bots throw a party for Joel.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Jungle Goddess

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of how people make toothbrushes. Lady Aberlin observes the neighbors' reactions after she can turn herself into a tiger. Princess Zelda arrives in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers brushes his teeth in his bathroom talks about how important it is to take care of our teeth, and even visits a dentist's office!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film of an earthmover digging a hole. Mr. McFeely shows a toothpaste video. Lady Aberlin wears a tiger suit, so she can be related to Daniel. Daniel declares that they are related by their hearts.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At the request of a television neighbor, Mister Rogers arrives with a model car and uses wooden blocks to build a roadway for it to travel. Prince Tuesday does not understand why he is not big like Neighbor Aber and King Friday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers plants a seed and visits a conservatory. King Friday orders Handyman Negri to sing a song about not being afraid. This makes the neighbors even more anxious about the “big thing” that is to arrive in the neighborhood.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers brings in a cat named Jimmy and remembers him as a kitten. He shows pictures of babies that have grown into adults. Everyone gathers at the castle just as the big thing rolls into the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers says that the bean plant he planted a few days ago has grown. Robert Troll is the only one who can communicate with the “big thing.” He learns that it wants a blanket; the blanket causes it to sprout a stem and leaves.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers plays games that require patience. Purple Panda experiments with a powder that causes flowers to grow. Prince Tuesday wishes the powder to make him grow. Mister Rogers goes to see the Harlem Spiritual Ensemble practice.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Harriett Cow shares the plans for a play. Lady Aberlin is greeted by a ballet dancer who dances her around the Neighborhood. The dancer inspires Ana Platypus to be a ballerina in the school play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers explains why he changes into a sweater and sneakers, and shows how people make sweaters and sneakers. Miss Paulificate brings Prince Tuesday's ragdoll to life by dancing with him. The neighbors decide their roles in a play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers plays dress-up with wigs and glasses, and says: “You can get dressed up in the fanciest of things, but the best style comes from inside, and it often spreads on your face with a smile.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: King Friday suggests that the Neighborhood of Make-Believe be turned upside down to see if the missing crown might fall out. Trolley finds the spare crown! Mister Rogers visits the Boys Choir of Harlem.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Maggie Stewart is dressed as Mr. McFeely and delivers a film about how people make sweaters. The children put on a play about a princess, a raccoon and a giant king. Prince Tuesday admits he had something to do with the missing crown.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers sees Bob Trow paint a portrait of Mr. McFeely. Robert Troll paints a portrait of King Friday who asks Lady Aberlin to have everyone copy it for themselves. Lady Aberlin explains that art comes from within each person.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a wooden toy airplane. Handyman Negri is working on a musical portrait of King Friday. Neighbor Aber provides his own tribute to King Friday as he mans his plane and draws a sky-written portrait of the King.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a picture of a blue tree. In art, you can make things any way you want. He also talks about visiting art museums.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers "colors a song" by playing music by Mozart to inspire his artwork. King Friday is curious about a delivery to X the Owl labelled "Deliver to X the Owl ONLY.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers sees Bob Trow approaching with his imaginary dog. Robert Troll and his imaginary pet, Gloria, are visiting with Queen Sara. When the Queen departs for a meeting, Gloria disappears into the castle.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video about people who make umbrellas. It's raining in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe and Neighbor Aber is interested in a special sale at the factory where Corney has manufactured Umbrella Rockits.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Marilyn Barnett stops by for some sitting down exercises. Prince Tuesday asks Handyman Negri to help bring his ragdoll to life. Corney has made a new (imaginary) umbrella Rockit for Daniel's imaginary friend, Malcolm Apricot Dinko.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers delights in a visitor who can whistle, especially because that's something Mister Rogers hasn't been able to learn. Nobody can do everything!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers talks and sings about wondering and being curious, which is important for learning! Jazz saxophonist Eric Kloss, who is blind, shows how he uses a special machine called the Kurzweil Personal Reader!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Elevators and escalators - Mister Rogers shows some toy machines, and rides on real ones that lift people and cars. There's even a hydraulic platform delivered by Mr. McFeely in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: A domino display artist sets up thousands of dominoes. When one is knocked over, they all go down in a fascinating pattern. Lady Elaine's elevator in Make-Believe takes Robert Troll up in the air as if he's flying.

programme.desc: After the sudden death of their father leaves them penniless, two spoiled sisters (Camilla Belle, Alexa Vega) get a rude awakening when they must live with their aunt in East L.A.

programme.title: The DUFF
programme.desc: A high-school senior (Mae Whitman) sets out to reinvent herself and revolutionize the student body's social order after learning that a judgmental classmate has given her an embarrassing nickname.

programme.title: Damsel
programme.desc: Samuel Alabaster, an affluent pioneer, ventures across the American frontier to marry the love of his life, Penelope. As his group traverses the West, the once-simple journey grows treacherous, blurring the lines between hero, villain and damsel.

programme.title: The Sisters Brothers
programme.desc: The Sisters brothers find themselves on a journey through the Northwest, bringing them to the mountains of Oregon, a dangerous brothel in a small town and the gold rush land of California -- an adventure that tests the deadly family ties that bind.

programme.title: The Kid
programme.desc: On the run in the American Southwest, a boy encounters the infamous outlaw Billy the Kid and the legendary lawman Pat Garrett. He soon finds himself caught in the crossfire as Billy and Garrett square off in a deadly game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: UHF
programme.desc: The manager of a small-time UHF station which has the lowest ratings in the country inadvertently hits it big with his strange programming ideas to keep Channel 62 from going down the tubes.

programme.title: Clifford
programme.desc: A mischievous and obnoxious 10-year-old boy makes life pure hell for his bachelor uncle while his parents are in Hawaii.

programme.title: Species
programme.desc: She's beautiful, seductive, intelligent, and her charms could spell doom for the entire human race! Ben Kingsley, Forrest Whitaker, and Natasha Henstridge star in this adrenaline-charged sci-fi hit.

programme.title: District 13: Ultimatum
programme.desc: Two years have passed since elite police officer Damien Tomasso teamed up with reformed vigilante Leito to save the notorious District 13, a racially charged ghetto populated by violent drug-dealing gangs and vicious killers.

programme.title: Season of the Witch
programme.desc: A 14th-century Crusader returns to a homeland devastated by the Black Plague. A beleaguered church commands the knight to transport an accused witch to a remote abbey, where monks will perform a ritual in hopes of ending the pestilence.

programme.title: Kalifornia
programme.desc: A graduate student and his girlfriend set out on a cross-country road trip to research a book they are writing on serial killers. Along the way, they pick up an ex-con and his girlfriend who will take them on a ride they'll never forget.

programme.title: Let The Right One In
programme.desc: Lonely, 12-year-old Oskar is bullied by his classmates. A new friendship develops when Eli, a pale young girl who only comes out at night, moves in next door. Coinciding with her arrival is a series of inexplicable disappearances and murders.

programme.title: La naturaleza lo hace mejor

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la inocencia de la infancia, el miedo es perfecto y no resulta influenciado por la racionalidad adulta, lo cual supone que se puede comprender a cabalidad el mundo que nos rodea.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Algunas personas creen que todo nuestro conocimiento del mundo nos llega a través de la percepción sensorial y de los poderes del razonamiento. Otras, en cambio, piensan que podemos obtener conocimiento por medio de la intuición.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La dinámica de las personas que viven bajo un mismo techo debe tener un equilibrio delicado. Mike y su novia, Lisa, mantienen una relación sana y, sin nada que les preocupe, se mudan juntos, pero no están solos en su nueva casa.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Ciertos mitos nativos norteamericanos hablan de criaturas sobrenaturales que protegen a los muertos. Los primeros exploradores de algunas tribus algonquinas del noreste de los Estados Unidos contaban historias sobre hombres lobo.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La familia Fahey ha vivido en la misma casa en la ciudad de Galway, Irlanda, durante más de treinta años. Martha Fahey creció allí y ahora se prepara para criar a su hija en el mismo ambiente, con la ayuda de sus padres.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Abril James siempre había soñado con renovar una casa victoriana. Cuando ella y su prometido Matt compran una casa histórica en Salt Lake City, estado de Utah.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Entre los psíquicos del mundo que afirman poseer habilidades extrasensoriales, los hay quienes dicen que pueden retroceder en el tiempo y ser testigos de acontecimientos del pasado que se desarrollan ante ellos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Cuando las personas inocentes se ven atacadas por entidades provenientes del reino sobrenatural, ponen su confianza en manos de investigadores paranormales para que estos los protejan de lo desconocido.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La fuerza de lo diabólico radica en el poder del engaño. De formas muy sutiles, destruye los lazos familiares y los de la amistad, desvirtúa las creencias de los creyentes y toma posesión de los vivos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: A lo largo de todo Estados Unidos existen millones de cementerios rurales. Algunos están muy mal identificados y, con el paso del tiempo, pueden ser olvidados con facilidad.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los sueños recurrentes constituyen la manera en la que nuestra mente lidia con los problemas que debemos resolver. Pero ¿qué ocurre cuando la vida comienza a imitar los miedos más temibles del subconsciente?

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: El estrés puede tener efectos poderosos y destructivos. Puede debilitar tanto el cuerpo como la mente, puede deteriorar las relaciones e incluso puede hacer que un alma se vuelva vulnerable a lo sobrenatural.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Todos tenemos secretos. Algunos de nosotros les ocultamos cosas a nuestros amigos para evitar la vergüenza. Otros, se las ocultamos a nuestros seres queridos porque tenemos el temor de que estropeen la imagen que tienen de nosotros.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los nuevos comienzos son siempre emocionantes. Pero sin importar cuánto deseemos que ocurran, siempre llegan con cierto grado de ansiedad y dificultad.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Aquí la naturaleza ha creado algunos de los paisajes más fabulosos del mundo. En el oeste americano, lo que es realidad y lo que es ilusión a menudo convergen, y ciertas ilusiones son, de hecho, muy reales.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Qatar es diminuto en superficie, pero enorme en ambición. Filmado desde todos los ángulos, y en medio de un auge de la construcción, sea testigo del futuro emerger del desierto.

programme.title: Sobrevivir en la naturaleza
programme.desc: Aprende las astutas tácticas que los animales utilizan para establecer jerarquías, asegurar recursos, ganar territorio y seducir a sus parejas.

programme.title: Africa, la más salvaje.
programme.desc: El Zambeze es uno de los ríos más importantes de África, siendo un destructor y creador de algunas de las especies de vida silvestre más espectaculares de todo el continente.

programme.title: Iconos de vida silvestre
programme.desc: Dos de los carnívoros más poderosos de África impactan uno con otro en la sabana. Leones y hienas deben matar casi todos los días para mantener a grandes familias.

programme.desc: John aspires to be a rapper and says Dabria wants to trap him with someone else's baby due to his future success. Then, can a mom keep her daughter away from her controlling boyfriend? Later, is Kelly's very sick baby Brandon's?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Sean and his girlfriend Lanika deny that he is the father of Rebecca's baby. Then, Kyrstal and Precious want to prove that their brother London did not father Paula's baby. Teen mom Alicia cheated on Tony, but doesn't know if he's the baby's father!

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.desc: Megan is 14 and pregnant with 19 year old Michael’s baby, but he doesn’t see any problems with this situation. Laurie, Megan’s mother, turns to Steve to help get through to her!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Teen Mom Murderer?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Who fathered Rashaunetta's newborn daughter: Brandon or Odell? Later, Genon received a call saying that Domo was caught in bed with a woman that she might know! Don't miss the lie detector test results on The Steve Wilkos Show!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: En este episodio especial, un grupo de espectadores selectos se enfrentará a algunos de los más memorables invitados de Jerry.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Khloe está dispuesta a contarle a Jamal que quizá no sea la mujer que él cree que es. Nick ha venido a confrontar a su esposa Barbara y al hombre con el que se ha estado acostando, Jason.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Carlton ha venido a revelarle a su novia que lleva una doble vida gay. Además, Tom Bergeron de "Bailando con las Estrellas" de la TV hará de juez famoso en un concurso de baile. Luego, Crystal le revela a su marido, Bobby, su infidelidad.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jake se acostó con el prometido de su hermano Joe. Después, Danny dice que dejará a su prometida Heather por una dama de compañía profesional llamada Chelsi. Además, hay más historias de matrimonios disparatados.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: John está siendo infiel a su esposa Destinee con Cici, pero Cici también tiene algunos secretos. Entonces, Lala suelta un bombazo a su novio. Además, Michael y su esposa Tayliana tienen secretos que revelarse mutuamente.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jaycee le demuestra a Brandy que nunca es correcto ser infiel y arruinar a una familia. Casi cree que su prometido podría aprender una lección de Kevin, un antiguo invitado. Además, concertamos una cita entre la espectadora Tamara y el invitado Nathan.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Anitra se entera de quién es realmente su pareja Kevin! Después, James está a semanas de casarse con Liz, pero tiene dos importantes secretos que contar. Después, Elliot dice que cometió el peor error de su vida al ser infiel a su novio, Rob.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: James está comprometido con Amanda, pero ahora confiesa lo de Melanie. Después, Jewel compite por el amor de su amante cuando Christa anuncia que lo quiere para ella.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Misty odia tanto al marido que se acaba de casar con su mejor amiga que está dispuesta a pagar el divorcio. ¡Lucus está dispuesto a divorciarse de su esposa de 6 semanas si su familia no deja de entrometerse!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Hope ha venido a enfrentarse a su mejor amiga, Laura, por robarle a su novio, Joey, y luego comprometerse con él. A continuación, John dirá que no tiene la culpa por acostarse con la mejor amiga de su novia.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Kenny vivía con dos hermanas, Lora y Misty, que también son sus amantes, pero las trata como sirvientas. Después, Jerry confronta a Kenny con los resultados de 9 pruebas de paternidad positivas, pero Kenny dice que solamente le importan 2 de sus 9 hijos.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Anita está dispuesta a dejar a su marido por su ex-amante. Luego Theresa está siendo infiel a su prometido con su hermano. Más tarde Kevin viene a decirle al ex de su novia, Jermaine, que se aleje.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Luciano le dice a Gertrudis que él va a internar en un hospital psiquiátrico, porque envenenar a su nieto es una locura. Ella le dice que esté pendiente de su esposa Morgana.

programme.title: Amor comprado

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Mariana cede ante la solicitud de Esteban, quien con sus mentiras logra convencerla e ir juntos al compromiso de Margot y Willy. Margot intenta comprar a Jaime, pero no acepta su oferta, ya que es leal a Willy.

programme.desc: Rosaura le devuelve a Luis Mario las tierras y la casa. Él la besa, aunque ella al principio se niega pero al final accede. Eduarda y Camelia se golpean y llega Gabriel a enterarse de todo.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario rechaza a Eva y le dice que se siente mal por lo de su hermana. Cuando se queda solo, piensa en los besos Rosaura, no de Eva.

programme.desc: Eduarda zarandea tanto a Jimena que la hace caer y comienza a perder sangre. Luisana pide que llamen a la ambulancia. La fiscal no acepta la declaración de Rosaura.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Moocy fast approach the showdown with Doflamingo - while the others with a beef against him continue to tag along. Meanwhile, Violet finds the key to Law's handcuffs, and Rebecca pledges to deliver it to him.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy makes headway toward Doflamingo's refuge, making his way through Doflamingo's guards, while down below Admiral Fujitora faces off against Sabo, who has the power of the Fire Fist from eating the Flare-Flare Fruit!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy cuts a lucky break as Kelly Funk shows him a shortcut to the Palace! But all may not be as it seems... Meanwhile, Franky and Zoro are locked in one-on-one duels, while Robin, Rebecca, and Bartolomeo enlist the help of the Tontattas.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Penned in at the bottom of a well, Luffy and Law are caught in a trap! But someone has come to save them who they least expect! Meanwhile, the Tontattas help Franky break in to the SMILE factory, and Bartolomeo resorts to tactics he used in the Colosseum.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Tontattas locate their captive comrades and seem to be able to get the message to them - the prison break is on! Meanwhile, heavy-hitters from the Colosseum turn from wringing each other's necks towards a unified plan.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Hidden far underground, Kin'emon finds his old friend Kanjuro whose powers allow the two to, quickly, but not elegantly, escape to the surface! Meanwhile, Cavendish shares his fears that the "Birdcage" game Doflamingo is playing has been rigged all along.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Tontattas are in full revolt! But can they keep their wits about them long enough to make it out? Meanwhile, Zoro finally gains the upper hand against Pica, and Franky finds a way to deal with Señor Pink.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky finally makes it into the factory and the Tontattas are reunited with their captive friends! But Princess Mansherry is nowhere to be found. Factory manager Kuween becomes irate when ignored and launches an attack on Franky.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin, Rebecca, and Bartolomeo draw closer to the Flower Field on the fourth level of the Royal Palace plateau, but a sudden attack by Gladius' exploding spheres sends Robin and Bartolomeo hurtling towards the level below.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Rebecca makes it to the Flower Field alone, but unfortunately finds company there that is less than friendly! Meanwhile, Bartolomeo pushes himself to the limit in order to help Luffy advance, but does he leave himself vulnerable in the process?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Diamante has Rebecca pinned and completely overpowered. If only the Soldier-san of her youth were able to protect her! Meanwhile, Luffy and Law finally surmount incredible odds to land themselves in striking distance of Doflamingo.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp uses Viola's Clairvoyance to prepare his ammunition to take Sugar out! But the slightest hesitation now will spell disaster, and the end of Luffy! Luckily for the Straw Hats, Usopp's ammunition has been specially designed for this situation!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The final showdown with Doflamingo begins, but the Warlord still has several tricks up his sleeve - including turning one of Luffy's own friends against him! Meanwhile Franky and Señor Pink are in a standoff to find out who is the coolest.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: All hopes rest on Luffy and Law being able to take down Doflamingo; but the Warlord has other plans in mind as he gives the two the fight of their lives, and reveals his true, shocking history! Meanwhile, Sabo finds out Fujitora's true intention…

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With Fujitora's stalemate arousing suspicion in the Navy ranks, Law and Luffy stand seconds away from execution at the hand of Doflamingo! But before he dispatches them both, he shares the secret of his sway over the Celestial Dragons!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The horrible secret of Flevance, the White Town, is revealed, giving clues to Law's traumatic past! A rage born from the lies of the World Government created a child who had the will to kill Corazon!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law's attack on Corazon looks less successful than he thought! And after he's accepted into the Doflamingo Family, Corazon's mysterious silence hides a fact that may save Law's life - and a hidden danger Law must face in Doflamingo himself!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Things grow stranger for Law as he learns the secret behind why Corazon feigns being mute! But the mysterious Corazon's actions are only beginning to baffle Law as he takes him on a journey to cure his White Lead Disease.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Corazon's double-dealing with the Navy raises suspicions both with Doflamingo and Law. But all that is secondary as Corazon finally has a chance to grab the Op-Op Fruit during a staged handoff arranged by the Government.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Op-Op Fruit is in Corazon's hands! But the price he paid to get it might be too high... When Law goes for help, unfortunate coincidences intervene and leave the two vulnerable! Meanwhile, Doflamingo and his clan finally land at Minion Island.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Doflamingo & his Family begin to zero in on Corazon and Law's whereabouts, but Corazon has a plan to hide Law long enough to let him escape, even if that means sacrificing his own life. A chain of lucky coincidences allows the plan to be set into motion.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Violet runs down the status of the open battles raging in Dressrosa - the Straw Hats, the Tontattas, the executives of the Doflamingo Family - all of them clash around the island, but it's Law's revelation to Doflamingo that moves the action forward!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy continues to battle Fake-mingo, but keeps accidentally battling Bellamy instead. Meanwhile the tide of battle turns against Law as painful scars from the past resurface. And Zoro gets unexpected help in his battle with Pica.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Bellamy escapes Doflamingo's control, but it might be too late. His long history with Doflamingo unfolds and leads to an inglorious end. Meanwhile, Hajrudin has been beaten down, but a fire still burns in him to pay back the favor he owes!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Lao G and Don Chinjao duke it out as each brings their most devastating attacks to the battle. But a misunderstanding caused by Baby 5 has Sai and Don Chinjao distracted - are they distracted enough for Lao G to gain the upper hand?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law is at the whim of Doflamingo and Trebol, while Luffy still has to deal with Bellamy, who fights to keep his honor even after being released by Doflamingo! Meanwhile, Gladius is about to detonate the ground around Cavendish and Bartolomeo!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: Shipping Wars

programme.title: Shipping Wars

programme.title: Shipping Wars

programme.title: Storage Wars: New York

programme.title: Storage Wars: New York

programme.title: Storage Wars: New York

programme.title: Storage Wars: New York

programme.title: Storage Wars: New York

programme.title: Storage Wars: New York

programme.title: Storage Wars: New York

programme.title: Storage Wars: New York

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Teyla, more determined than ever to find the missing Athosians, convinces Sheppard to travel with her to a trading settlement in search for answers. What they find there leads them to startling discovery that no one could have anticipated.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: After an unforeseen return, Dr. Carson Beckett shares that he has been held captive. As Teyla is re-united with some missing fellow Athosians, she begins to formulate a plan to ensure their escape, if she is able to find them in time.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Disheartened by another unsuccessful search for Teyla, Lt. Colonel Sheppard returns to Atlantis and senses that something is not right—the city has been abandoned. Now, McKay sets out on a risky plan to reverse a future that went horribly wrong.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: As Sheppard and Ronon are trapped beneath a collapsed compound, McKay and Lorne are trapped in another pocket of debris. Michael’s flagship Wraith Cruiser hurtles towards the compound, while Carter leads a rescue mission. Who will reach them first?

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: When Dr. Keller fails to report for her shift, concerned team members are shocked to discover her unconscious in her quarters. With the situation on Atlantis escalating, Woolsey is ultimately faced with a decision that could cost Keller her life.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: During an off-world mission, Ronon (Jason Momoa) is ambushed and captured by his former friend, Tyre (Mark Dacascos), and turned over to the Wraith. As the team scrambles for leads to locate their friend, Ronon undergoes a torturous ordeal.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: With the Destiny still out of power, a plan is born to abandon the ship using the last working shuttle, in hopes that another planet will be habitable. But hope is short-lived when the only way to determine who will go and who will stay is a lottery.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Despite severe rationing and around-the-clock security, the water reserves onboard the Destiny continue to drop. Dr. Nicholas Rush has no explanation for this latest setback but, if they are to survive, they must find a new water source soon.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: With the situation onboard the Destiny dire, General O’Neill (Richard Dean Anderson) and Homeworld Command order Col. Young to execute a high-risk plan concocted by the IOA scientists which, in theory, could return the crew to Earth.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: After making a surprising discovery on a jungle planet, members of the team become ill. In an attempt to isolate the infection, the team sets up camp in the jungle. But when night falls, the illness will be the least of their worries.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Col. Jack O'Neill (Richard Dean Anderson) and his new SG recruits have become the targets of a secret hostile takeover. Now it's up to a wounded O'Neill and his neophyte troop to save the command center from a possible alien invasion!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: During a pursuit by the Goa'uld gliders, Teal'c fails to make it through the Stargate before it is destroyed. Now SG-1 has only 48 hours to reestablish Teal'c's energy signature from the temporary memory of the Stargate before it's erased…for good!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Late one evening, Harm receives a message from his ex-girlfriend. Harm returns the call and is devastated to find out that Parker is dead. Eager to help, Harm immediately makes plans to meet with Agent Kenworthy who will be leading the NCIS investigation.

programme.desc: When Captain Huddleston hears that the marine corporal has been charged with rape, he sends Lt. Colonel Sarah Mac MacKenzie to handle the case in a hot zone of Anti-American activity.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Kat tires to relax in private but finds his nap encroached on by Coop and his friends playing Capture The Flag. // When OLM shows an unusual interest in Coop and Dennis’ favourite show, they become equally obsessed with finding out why she likes it.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: It’s time for the annual Bootsville Days festival celebrating the town’s founding. // Kat’s penchant for munching as he works on his secret rocket has him tipping the scales with rolls of flab!

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: After Coop uses cat whispering to make Kat into his new best friend, he becomes a pal to all animals. // Coop and Dennis join the school soccer team but Coop would rather show off than use teamwork.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Kat gets a transceiver stuck in his ear, making him highly susceptible to sound, especially Millie’s singing voice. // After Kat’s latest tantrum almost destroys the house Dad starts his own extreme renovation.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kail reveals news about Chris while Briana becomes overwhelmed by Stella's father's absence. Jaylan & Leah make a major move forward. Ashley's vaccination decision upsets her mom. Jade gets a new house but is unsure who will live there when Sean returns.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kail and Javi consider reuniting. Ashley supports Bar through his mom's health concerns. Briana tries to bring Luis and Devoin together for her girls. Jaylan grows closer to Leah and her family. Jade opens a new salon while prepping for Sean's return.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kail makes a public allegation about Briana, so Bri sends her a gift. Jade & Kloie welcome Sean home from rehab. Leah realizes she & Jaylan don't see marriage the same way. Ashley & Bar reignite their romance while Kail considers her future on the show.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Leah speaks out about the social media drama that has gone down recently and Kail reveals she's in a new relationship. Jade discusses rekindling her love for Sean post-rehab and Ashley explains how she avoided divorce.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kail shares a devastating secret while Briana defends her choices. Kail's ex, Chris, shares his side of the story and a surprise guest shocks everyone.

programme.title: Teen Mom Family Reunion
programme.desc: Maci and Chey organize a "Family Reunion" with the cast of Teen Mom OG and Teen Mom 2. When a surprise guest is revealed, drama surfaces between the castmates. Will the women be able to work through their issues, or will the drama tear them apart?

programme.title: Teen Mom Family Reunion
programme.desc: The group sets out for their first activity together, where some unexpected bonds form. Later, the moms have their first session with life coach, Cheyenne Bryant, who encourages them to realize they're more alike than they think.

programme.title: Teen Mom Family Reunion
programme.desc: The entire cast begins to let loose and form new friendships, while a new dad joins the group. Leah decides to invite someone special to the reunion while Amber opens up about her strained relationship with her daughter.

programme.title: Teen Mom Family Reunion
programme.desc: A challenging obstacle course lands a cast member in the hospital, while Coach Bryant forces the OGs to revisit their tumultuous past. As the group enjoys a backyard BBQ, a controversial cast member arrives, leaving everyone at a loss for words.

programme.title: Teen Mom Family Reunion
programme.desc: The cast deals with the aftershock of seeing Farrah again, as she threatens to derail the entire reunion. The boys head out on a boat for some dad time leaving the girls to spend time with Coach Bryant. Later, Maci and Farrah sit down face-to-face.

programme.title: Teen Mom Family Reunion
programme.desc: What mom doesn't need a break? That's why cast members from across the Teen Mom franchise are coming together for a tropical vacation. But it's not all rest and relaxation, as the moms dive deep into relationship, friendship and parenting issues.

programme.title: Teen Mom Family Reunion
programme.desc: The Teen Moms and their Mom's all unite for the first time ever, for some Teen Grandmamma Drama! Tension builds between Briana and Roxanne, and Ashely and Tea due to a horrible social media feud, while Cate shocks everyone with surprise guests!
